_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

name: =?utf-8?B?TWFybGVuZSBHYWzDoW4tV29vZHM=?=
subject: Firsts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I would put Arizona families first if elected to Congress.

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107472849/544791436/-1882479441?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.10_Firsts_B1_F1_S1_C1_AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRiZTcyMDgtZmMyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bOt1qN4GnZr1SNZO7ZGgdaEDIWOmdiD5t3Duftx06iA=)
---
There’s something to be said about firsts in life. I am a _first_ -generation Cuban American who has proudly called Arizona home for decades. I would be the _first_ Latina to represent Arizona in the House. And unlike spineless MAGA puppet David Schweikert, I would put Arizona families _first_ if elected to Congress. **I am ready to kick out David Schweikert and fight back against Republicans’ attempts to cut Medicaid, trample on our rights, and erode our democracy.** **[_But _first_ , I need your support to get across the finish line. name: Ryan Zinke
subject: At my wits' end...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

|
---
| | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/_fkiL-uhjzX0pRZlQDndlegkeypbK3f3QUJ83C0dihJ-K4wk9V-5SXlkyAr59yKNScZW11_ULVy1JX0L5ACOgfuglX_MIHB4lLOKed0HK7lNNtrvWIVlqJ65jsyoTYIfDQEt-HQLikDjjrSZxk-GXm2x0WfkkO8fts2nuSicO859LUdqyu_aFcAMTrbkQaCAVHZvBKE2Sn7BqddGqYoCq9PgQrUGC-3Ga8WEmB3r81y_yPSqVwpuH-Cnsw7ObgRL83uylimUBe9MjGF4xFMd3GIOvG0f-mFyEE1bXzHOPtID0Xv4XMiXblDQVB2uk_Rr_-AW11vUUxJtYxNQncCT8kntau0_y0OpnPG-8Di6V72mJt6UbRJCpY_23feGyyBFYMrbETaOEsYyqeoclg_IIkpKDOHoAfluWixuKkEV2TQVY-vvDJHtnc12FXF-XuDUk-XAdJgTCpMLCdv7WJP2W39ConfxMtBYCpq1FBT2ssqj4OtqehGy/z0IALGQGkllplolTNEpiKiq0ROoPhSbT/8)
---

Closing the curtains on my campaign.

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

**[Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/cZKCx3nW4pM4iGs1WPXLvRQIHHX2zx6SECfLPaLp9PJPhIvt8Cw5y8qJ4P5cp8UCXnRi-wRhbBbzGzOr-VNKf-LwqvjAgE0bkKmZzG2g4GRibw78riBb2AmCMVHwBfaJNLG6ufHL34YDn7MHQZLcKPmYgIZtkzEsBguOPEhk0I0gNdc2ZCiESmN1muldf1SlpBU9v-K_UY8KO5Z31ECGEuKW3J-pcJd3XvYd3g4Ag2KShNHngz_YsH6-mQh42267G03kUy0CTu3VKJ1YDUipsYWtf8dwoGBVncIf6mVnFfkRyTdpMeEYp4zd8zFB2fIbhIomZgENiQzJ93qdqVb1WpENvpPcfrV-ssWx8pL0z_hgHTnYEjOMxCj6Jbdsy6Y5JVs0_lPPJd3L6yPgqP3N5i3jSBQTDAV9Bec7dy98mids5UzlDfiOqmK9DtRvTNsdfN9rc7CDt5S64MftJ1ASkL38VzqJ5BTOyd4QSG1mo9y2W1l6E3Fr/cSu0baW68jZGu6SaCzeM1C1fDmGI9Uhz/8 "Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.")**

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has already pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, but Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrat impeachments and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as Secretary of the Interior starting in 2017 and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.
In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/duKN-IRqfUrn9bWebl3pVf8CcnLYtjvPk-jgm_PzivmcYLUMLLeDHZpJWzgSjF8LuWOEnk0Uv0_4ctI7ah9nGS1Dp5dJWj9PCFfDJfN11rfQY4ATv04cuEXm7-pGBeBlM1Z6Q0IdByN6XBZrWVfLrBd4EvMd1ClDg0jTlwGwy6Aa-impIOSYaM1stBBdOCARtI1JCZ9j42ajD-5ex8I__WQzNNfoUXW6cTJJDhfqivGZpQ-TEK_4m-fCfA18Mih_zEUsg1MNOeo9YQK2TbPagCQCPEEMJ2qlnv0nPGvMPrxzoKm_BL77AMN4GZhsN64XCJ82-AAiKnHU5OvQdlmaEoWiA8v9yC9pQyG-0_7XgcX8nizO5vhf6BDWaEVz2uCq1xQBYfO47YPNP-Txzd6a5QlEzlPikg8M98iWnw2ZAIEhS9nH2qtmOKxbIM4xPWEBq-YLncRj61w7hET9h1aIrV7BZSvxvRQ708-ueJ1GOXmWawazISZJ/nT7ltmYZvvZMikaittaOXI0-1vTsRwEu/8 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now, I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.")**

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | | [Chip In NOW!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/EMbrIb9gn_u_a_0-3Fd6zKLxlLnx4aTvqlikO6A2ZUb1W-jyU6--t94Q1z_6UHl29UHhoKy5R4Uga1i5BkWVdA2-w0lSF0oZxaRy83eC734BmkgdIwQe7XsgMPZvcBnc9igDjRuT2NBAPvCkq-v1FzWsa3ZsbSp1R3jCkM_JY8JigXvtVAJZxyshYPIG9tL3K2-cw4RENC1scaC304jcmwSqg7cDWHWJsqfqMMIfOBPmn0sRoWxL92ZIIsF1wADlffpLqhgPeWlTTqqC5hZOtonBzWwIAwUN_YiDy6WSP2V0O_vrogj0pIO9M28hablxdxU-b-10hDt8tBztGmnglTv2Wa7XAz44wJfgxcqlY9aaBu_pIAs3HfVtapmC-3Kg3D1lOcs14KldB_V2t2QOTU5Q_Y7ak-b9JnaquqhWbjt0E1s-a9cTW892VItAUeRYCI-4bXzF-LVlbW9mWZJl3bjaDIZUMR-UIfB6m_J5trIApuiqBqhX/ADt6N6Tyvh0QK2sXhWD-Jb8ds6b0ewAe/8 "Chip In NOW!")
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,

Ryan Zinke

Peter, I am shocked. I have reached out to 50+ supporters today, and you are the first person who has taken the time to read my message.

I sincerely hope that you listen to what I need to say.

Now, since you are doing me a favor, I want to be completely honest with you..... However, I fear you might not like what I have to say.

I am Young Kim, an immigrant, a mother, a conservative American Patriot, and a chief irritant to career politicians in Washington.

Unfortunately, I do not fit in the category that many in Washington would like to place me in:

I am a woman, I own a small business, and I am **NOT** a part of the wealthy elite. I was not born as an American citizen, and English is not my first language. However, I am a proud American Patriot, tried and true.

Now, I am in Washington fighting for **YOU** and other everyday Americans who want to see lower taxes and the American Dream protected.

But, I am **REVOLTED** by what I've seen here, and you should be too.

Peter, so many in Washington don't care about you, but I do.

There are too many politicians who are there for themselves, furthering their own agendas and tossing the everyday American, like you and me, under the bus. They want **MORE** power, **MORE** influence, and **MORE** money - all for themselves. These lawmakers do not care about you, and it is **APPALLING**.

All I can say is: I call it like I see it, and I do not like what I've seen, but I will never let these career politicians forget about **YOU**. This is how I have found myself as a major target of Left-Wing Super PACs and Democrat campaign funds, who are desperately trying to defeat my battleground campaign in this cycle.

Dear Peter, In the wake of Trump’s so-called _“Liberation Day”_ —where he slapped tariffs on nearly every country on Earth (yes, even the penguin ones)—Americans are already feeling the ripple effects. Prices are rising, uncertainty is growing, and working families are getting hit the hardest. We want to hear from you:
**What are your top economic concerns right now?**

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z4cjjdka84njheq21e70b255g0i1o6akhlg4qfvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbeqv950gs43rrn4vvkuphs371ks6gnnuhqifms0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h2bs)**_ [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6nbedje867ovv7nkhunaih6vr6hc0mnpdscm78o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8ihubiei4ss4fh2hrm07sbvt32j659gpkj29heg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zsu176l3go1ottjm72612ofbdue7vbf8bbg3j4vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h2bs)**_
---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs54abfdisdhon0m37st04l85oju6q7b7bda1f6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq4t9k66q3bd9ieir38ctieko7fcjheiprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni62ob2c1ieaoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2znld7lp757vosk74722ckd2e706u0656kiikso4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor1c5h2bs)_

Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Tywana Hampton, =?UTF-8?Q?God=E2=80=99s?= Ballot
subject: Winsome Earle-Sears and I were both Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common:

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk9g42nojcfbb0r4s5gut9jlgnuu8gfc9sb41k48_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. **Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. **

I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, _"_Obama, of course_!"_
Then my husband introduced me to a book, _Please Stop Helping Us._ This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be __meant__ to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. **But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only _hold folks back_ from rising to the middle class. **

In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?"

I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." _It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. _

As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life.

I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it.

**It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. **

[**Now, Winsome Earle-Sears is running to be Governor, and I 'm so proud to support her and be there for her again. I'm doing her a favor today and emailing you asking you to support her campaign and make history:**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5p086h3kojo0a3o4u45soltu5vjmgaijtm06a3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $25 >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6ni6q930hsl2buk73b800o1bl6apmijtevl5es8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $50 >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqi6ih6dci1gkvs1boh6h49beqo2ls905ui33dm0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $100 >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5nar7ir2i69h65r4so5hqpe5mv6u85l3mcusc10_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
[ DONATE TODAY >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z138jfh49cs4p5j052o81e1bdaqdaa420v3i62jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on.

**[I hope you'll join me in helping Winsome Earle-Sears win this year!](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zan8uqnd37929gsp5u68n55t9l2n7rhl0ksqrnv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)**
---
[ DONATE TODAY >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztj2alj6lodosr721sqsg3cqs8c17mqjf0t9khi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
Thanks for your time,
Tywana Hampton
---

|
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqgjhklo65e7ic9vnno9umuncgdp0pn288b6buko_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)
---
Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znjdc6mn4mg3b2jchkkvafoo15rpl9m6jjujhnh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor6clh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9tsfh2bfqhvhk9342f16l5krrhq19383fl11hqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze02gnuqfpikp8qv3u2kse35l4ut2m2i669fe0a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpaehepbbjp3e1m6opbae191budjr3v52qspqa0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za1lhililp1pompv97bjig2ie6311f4tnub5ft5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl6mbmot33rgbq7mo5pu0drm4p72o178e3qpm8oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6i2qvr6fi2p96vagvjlil1r25o9qi3v4to0na50_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ostpjqf9idu8sf0nfvb314angf6qs3pat0jfk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1r8eaftrk04iapdondmcnqasv61d9lgjsdqo8a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjimeor5c5h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8q5mfif9asl4moq3r2hcrd7tajuescms8brlco_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjim1pb4cjh2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0e7vpnh23g6rmnkadomm0vbrjga54bt0throd78_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjim1pb4cjh2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.

Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkc8505u05brincij4po0jnhau819ojb1u5rbtv8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjim1pb4cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4glfocfpnlobhoeaa9tj2b99upi4ra3nkl29duo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjim1pb4cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziboo1lc1udipbgbcsi8c9b532a2ibmkadtsstf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjim1pb4cjh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you today...

_What is your opinion about the Supreme Court 's role in our constitutional republic? _

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvi3ftekaq17lte2669lv0euf64n4m2se0m3bpqo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjim1pb4cjh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Tywana Hampton, =?UTF-8?Q?God=E2=80=99s?= Ballot
subject: Winsome Earle-Sears and I were both Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common:

| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjj60so8uklqrj8jg895mgrr1qtqg5hvq270ju8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. **Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. **

I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, _"_Obama, of course_!"_
Then my husband introduced me to a book, _Please Stop Helping Us._ This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be __meant__ to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. **But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only _hold folks back_ from rising to the middle class. **

In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?"

I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." _It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. _

As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life.

I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it.

**It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. **

[**Now, Winsome Earle-Sears is running to be Governor, and I 'm so proud to support her and be there for her again. I'm doing her a favor today and emailing you asking you to support her campaign and make history:**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9g2395833a94ace8lksrop3uovam6rlnn71e028_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj2cjh2bs)

Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on.

**[I hope you'll join me in helping Winsome Earle-Sears win this year!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3atuq4pa0s0d47ljsecpn25qjq7h45v6dcepcb8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj2cjh2bs)**

Thanks for your time,
Tywana Hampton

Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z05npsh2fjd099vdvbsnhuijophuo32cimvq8d28_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj2cjh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

clean_body: Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: | | | Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, "Obama, of course!" Then my husband introduced me to a book, Please Stop Helping Us. This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be meant to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only hold folks back from rising to the middle class. In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?" I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life. I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it. It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on. Thanks for your time, Tywana Hampton | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | | | | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Military disclaimer: Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 | | Pop Acta Media | National Republican Polling PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Now Available: “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer”
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo8fvfdtivm09bss637mt4pr0ro4hmop5cicce4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj6c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5a5l0e5lhhl2e5lmf96s4k16v5u4fj0eano9as8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj6c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdii9unqa8pdcgrhc7ecvq917anpkrch4ehqgv6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj6c9h2bs) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z961eulu1jl4hm9scajq0uhb9n7fcunniump4pl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm8oj6c9h2bs)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Tywana Hampton, =?UTF-8?Q?God=E2=80=99s?= Ballot
subject: Winsome Earle-Sears and I were both Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common:

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpa3g9mnk8dpigdb5hfrr62mhs6ekiftf8pul8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)
---
Friend, Winsome Earle-Sears and I have something in common: We both thought that because we were black, we were Democrats. **Of course, now we 're both conservatives, and Winsome is even running as a Republican to be Governor. **

I remember being in a Burlington Coat Factory in 2008, and two ladies approached me asking who I was voting for. I couldn't believe two black ladies would even ask me that. I responded, _"_Obama, of course_!"_
Then my husband introduced me to a book, _Please Stop Helping Us._ This book showed me how well-intentioned government programs may be __meant__ to lift the poor out of poverty, especially poor minorities. **But the truth is that many of these welfare programs only _hold folks back_ from rising to the middle class. **

In 2019, I met Winsome Earle-Sears at a conservative conference, and while walking to a restaurant, Winsome caught up to me and said, "Tywana Hampton?"

I said, "Yes?" and she said, "I hear you are the one to know." _It 's funny to think back on this meeting when you see everything she's accomplished. _

As I got to know Winsome, I realized what a sweet and caring person she is. She's strong in her faith and lets God guide her through life.

I did everything I could to get her elected in 2021 as Virginia's first black female lieutenant governor along with Governor Glenn Youngkin - door knocking, phone banking, attending rallies, you name it.

**It was a labor of love, and it all paid off when she and Governor Youngkin were sworn in and got our state back on track. **

[**Now, Winsome Earle-Sears is running to be Governor, and I 'm so proud to support her and be there for her again. I'm doing her a favor today and emailing you asking you to support her campaign and make history:**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvriabtk87miuobbq4c81gel37sossohr5rgth5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)
---

---
[ DONATE $50 >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrq2plsk6k6gnojcsvbd88ljrgfg593369k6ceu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)

[ DONATE $100 >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcs4bvd8f9j8caer1m55vcodsvip3oob9pu3agb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE TODAY >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1vdbt767fdd4u2b107tr51ivldn1c2rhq2kji2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)
---
Take it from me - Winsome Earle-Sears is a great conservative and she works hard to help everyone regardless of skin color, background, economic status, on and on.

**[I hope you'll join me in helping Winsome Earle-Sears win this year!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0v7c0g6bd27ttldrpn5kl0a7lg96j0jbhcmdn60_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)**
---
[ DONATE TODAY >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zadgb6bc6dp1j7t9d73l6bnfcb7t88odmbckb0oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)
---
Thanks for your time,
Tywana Hampton
---

|
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvijcmceobn7jut6bua3jja75p9j86sgdhr485bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)
---
Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoco7dl9311deojnvqolls047o9l3mjtsqqreapo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhm4p30cjh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.

subject: Breaking my silence . . .
body:
In the docuseries I’ll be releasing shortly, you’ll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpu933av8enk8mqn4e5lj906j6bgbc4k028ajcf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)
Dear Patriot,

The nightmare I could have never imagined has played out since February 2023, when my hand-selected board at Project Veritas **ousted me from the organization I founded** in a small room on top of a carriage house built by my grandfather.

As you know, Project Veritas sued me, and I counter-sued**. They are now on the run**.

**I 'm not seeking revenge or retribution . . . I'm seeking justice**, and [**I recently decided to tell the full, behind-the-scenes story**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuhp9mdjbjmrcmrf27utjrsiv0eqq743u7qj5o1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs) of what has happened and is happening with Project Veritas and the board members behind the coup.

[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq3qddpa95psctotebrsicmab64bjdrc7v5g0180_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)
[**In the docuseries I 'll be releasing shortly**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z96kr7vb1cokuvi6ksoh6jeku6grqpa5cso7iuq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs), you'll be able to see the first few chapters of the legal battle unfold, but the FULL TRUTH must he told and that will take our day in court. To get there, **[**I need your help to cover the climbing costs.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4psqm8vkudr88r04r96k20h2c9bhm3c86ep5og0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)**

**[**Watch the teaser for my docuseries on Project Veritas here, and help me seek justice.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8fhbqm7csk8qpb60icd5894cviqun15n4l0b99o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)**

[**I sincerely need your help to keep fighting**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj42obutt5coq8ih8ou0erlotq2nq3a1nmm823r0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)to expose the whole story and finally get my day in court. [**Will you donate today to help fund the remaining depositions?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0p92nl204t2do1fl8pj0me88smro1607nphg5i0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)

My attorney will be working incredible hours this month with five more LENGTHY depositions that will cost around $18k each. **I have $7k left in the retainer account, so I have to raise over $85,000 this month alone.[**Please, will you help?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpulc11c3ea1l93uumuh4im3t3rl63gipa15h548_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs)**

Before you do, [**watch the teaser for the docuseries**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjr94a65hsbh71bsct61j8t2k7qgv66tpt7bgnj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs). Yes, it's cryptic, but for reasons that I can disclose later.

Stay tuned, and please, [**donate as much as you can to my legal defense fund hosted by Liberty Guard**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh2npk0t7car98255ovbc12ve8t7icbop7r3f1rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cjhmapr6cph2bs). The funds are vitally needed to close this chapter of my life and **serve justice by telling the truth**.

With Respect and Gratitude,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Shinji Oh
subject: Happy Mother’s Day 💐
body:
This Mother’s Day, we’re highlighting the importance of being able to take time off to care for yourself or a lo
| | |
---
| |
---
| Happy Mother's Day 💐
---
| Friends-
This Mother's Day, we're highlighting the importance of being able to take time off to care for yourself or a loved one without compromising your family's financial situation. Without Paid Family & Medical Leave in Virginia, [women often have to leave the workforce](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruKvRy86v0oICwcG2ZxVt2Qp616eoNGO7jv-nBN2WlRO08CLObbjjtyoEJ_1eSsxTYU3myYKMkiLDhRv8KYGNQXqOm359FCW2V-T7VkwYNmtUBB99wuaHZVHnSYuR92Uou4GJ--TfoP_rklQ9T-8ifOYTpInyHVufGVlKBv-Kx4Ts9qRWAy6VzZo54hXH_lEZ_hJ5hN5n3K75dj2kXEy0pSVkw7zrI1g-TtZvx2nltFz-kTZT9gfi1tQfuPMKfqM&c=1S-Ka2Wr_eLO0mdgGVDiY0fdiAIFTTS2HzLnbClSvheRqrIxVk0fpw==&ch=3aXYhcdSG0ofRu7TBNN4n4IJlzN1ygmySItqkrfkp6-uGZP8cXaBDg==) to care for their loved ones, when, more than ever, [families depend on women's earnings](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruKvRy86v0oICwcG2ZxVt2Qp616eoNGO7jv-nBN2WlRO08CLObbjjtyoEJ_1eSsxNlXe97iAwDVQeHowcILWuj491_wdkV1oAjf7Jw18n7xCsK0oY3yREXURUJY7bmzlcsVG9fcp81tSHe7MRyfEgHDv6fl-2KpbpCSv5hUnyi6QtRJv61NV-ifl8s0XX0ofJEULfw564VvaMUZkbYVfD3PyU-ggOpZXHPyQ3erCzODkJqmN1KLjvwg6LNSAQy4AWhsxE1H_B_-ilDuItkeGKUfVv9dTR8Hb_jyQs8buESpVtEd_aJkqtCNd87Sfvxwt&c=1S-Ka2Wr_eLO0mdgGVDiY0fdiAIFTTS2HzLnbClSvheRqrIxVk0fpw==&ch=3aXYhcdSG0ofRu7TBNN4n4IJlzN1ygmySItqkrfkp6-uGZP8cXaBDg==). More than that, research shows that mothers' access to leave can [positively impact their children's health and development](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruKvRy86v0oICwcG2ZxVt2Qp616eoNGO7jv-nBN2WlRO08CLObbjjtyoEJ_1eSsxNlXe97iAwDVQeHowcILWuj491_wdkV1oAjf7Jw18n7xCsK0oY3yREXURUJY7bmzlcsVG9fcp81tSHe7MRyfEgHDv6fl-2KpbpCSv5hUnyi6QtRJv61NV-ifl8s0XX0ofJEULfw564VvaMUZkbYVfD3PyU-ggOpZXHPyQ3erCzODkJqmN1KLjvwg6LNSAQy4AWhsxE1H_B_-ilDuItkeGKUfVv9dTR8Hb_jyQs8buESrhoJOFCqWuUPBI1gU3tSSj&c=1S-Ka2Wr_eLO0mdgGVDiY0fdiAIFTTS2HzLnbClSvheRqrIxVk0fpw==&ch=3aXYhcdSG0ofRu7TBNN4n4IJlzN1ygmySItqkrfkp6-uGZP8cXaBDg==) and affect their long-term educational and earnings outcomes.
---
| |
---
| | [Read More Here](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ruKvRy86v0oICwcG2ZxVt2Qp616eoNGO7jv-nBN2WlRO08CLObbjjkI2Dsx79zGTQeSVDjvb9zoSJfa0RLgFIesZMZGlD2eBjpfuxB07Fb5PWwuUPeoReQCidTcJ8OHtjq0dWTCBU0icO0FDB9qmzwedwMxpUNZXAW84YF3lD_E72_i7hTgdhnlmhAuUS6i2S1vOVPFU1IEWyIZCDOZpcQwmFOjanlJocNLcDTgSDy1c5M4XRtzDjWSZz83J6tY9vkTVZH3rWXo5UoxC2QfEB44_-cPDSmhZ-RLjvz0j2kEQ29yQhWeqipA9jmYLK7Z1&c=1S-Ka2Wr_eLO0mdgGVDiY0fdiAIFTTS2HzLnbClSvheRqrIxVk0fpw==&ch=3aXYhcdSG0ofRu7TBNN4n4IJlzN1ygmySItqkrfkp6-uGZP8cXaBDg==)
---
| Access to paid leave benefits families and the economy in the long run. With his veto of this legislation in March, Governor Youngkin stood firmly with corporations over Virginia families. We can't properly celebrate Mother's Day without supporting mothers in every possible way; it's time for Paid Family & Medical Leave in Virginia.
Shinji Oh Digital Manager

name: Vivek
subject: What I told my sons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
They’re still too little to understand politics. But I wasn’t going to lie to them.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-DqUTl613uPN_t3MMA)Before I announced this campaign, I sat down with my two young sons.
They're not old enough to grasp what a campaign or politics really is. But they know when something serious is happening.[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)So I told them the truth. We'll be on the road. _A lot._
They might see strangers shouting at dad... I might be out of town some days... They might read nasty headlines about our family -- things that aren't true.
I promised to always keep them safe, but I also told them the truth:
**This won 't be easy. But when your country is at a crossroads, you don't hide. You lead.****
****[That 's why I'm running for Governor of Ohio.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)****
**Not because it 's easy. Not because it's safe. But because I refuse to let my sons grow up in a country that no longer believes in itself.
Ohio should be the state that leads this nation again -- in education, in industry, in values that matter.
I'm fighting for that future. For my family. For yours. For every child who deserves a country worth inheriting.**
****[If you believe that too, I need you with me today.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)**[ CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-qLNAh2Y2Q)This isn't just a campaign. It's a mission.
Let's win it - together.
**Vivek Ramaswamy **Candidate for Governor of Ohio
* * *
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUxMV84Ni1WVC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzgyODctMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MTFfODYtVlQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM4Mjg3LTM2MjMifQ/W1xWFi5dJhtmsWKW_dbBJg)This is Vivek. I'm building a movement to make Ohio the state of American excellence --Reviving our schools. Reclaiming our values. Restoring pride in our country.
But I can't do it alone. I need your voice behind me.
**[If you believe in this mission, please endorse my campaign today:](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUxMV84Ni1WVC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzgyODctMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MTFfODYtVlQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM4Mjg3LTM2MjMifQ/soGEESkdwsoyKBSjmmRblw)**[ ENDORSE VIVEK
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDUxMV84Ni1WVC4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MzgyODctMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA1MTFfODYtVlQuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjM4Mjg3LTM2MjMifQ/gX7q9x2V7o06sMkarBjlkg)| | |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Learn economics with Art Laffer
body:
I am excited to announce that Hillsdale’s online teaching series, “Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,” is now available to own as a DVD box set.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sCV8NFsP5k36OTdK1zQ-kQ~~/AARclBA~/mOnEN1wRoN5FUZ5J3UDlMJ1CYwQVKpc2P2tIZ5PT_itl77VyTGR2EVvKkDk6KG54nbwsspFHzXD-3AYwDqacd8qpRSxyDmD13GdD3e4uFtOgAZQ_WbTQqnLnSRKHopwS0jRmk0Sxrfi761KqZCKDKMuudYjKmnLErsWCsXjeSqBah-5_8xwC-4v3o9onR_FBehG2FZF8OkyQrPlJBLU6AtZ7iIRRevsfOWXBCIwutyQ5C2SxwRXanE-jp_QdkRYVKYNOTK3nJUgO6MaCXFE8p0bY3VCLyPf2PBS2VZ6tM3Okf8_kmRfXWaE0QgLaMtKVcXElTZKUOAREma4BBRDbLTH2d5aYeZoVinw-CvQAaqs~)
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sCV8NFsP5k36OTdK1zQ-kQ~~/AARclBA~/mOnEN1wRoN5FUZ5J3UDlMJ1CYwQVKpc2P2tIZ5PT_itl77VyTGR2EVvKkDk6KG54nbwsspFHzXD-3AYwDqacd8qpRSxyDmD13GdD3e4uFtOgAZQ_WbTQqnLnSRKHopwS0jRmk0Sxrfi761KqZCKDKMuudYjKmnLErsWCsXjeSqBah-5_8xwC-4v3o9onR_FBehG2FZF8OkyQrPlJBLU6AtZ7iIRRevsfOWXBCIwutyQ5C2SxwRXanE-jp_QdkRYVKYNOTK3nJUgO6MaCXFE8p0bY3VCLyPf2PBS2VZ6tM3Okf8_kmRfXWaE0QgLaMtKVcXElTZKUOAREma4BBRDbLTH2d5aYeZoVinw-CvQAaqs~) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sCV8NFsP5k36OTdK1zQ-kQ~~/AARclBA~/mOnEN1wRoN5FUZ5J3UDlMJ1CYwQVKpc2P2tIZ5PT_itl77VyTGR2EVvKkDk6KG54nbwsspFHzXD-3AYwDqacd8qpRSxyDmD13GdD3e4uFtOgAZQ_WbTQqnLnSRKHopwS0jRmk0Sxrfi761KqZCKDKMuudYjKmnLErsWCsXjeSqBah-5_8xwC-4v3o9onR_FBehG2FZF8OkyQrPlJBLU6AtZ7iIRRevsfOWXBCIwutyQ5C2SxwRXanE-jp_QdkRYVKYNOTK3nJUgO6MaCXFE8p0bY3VCLyPf2PBS2VZ6tM3Okf8_kmRfXWaE0QgLaMtKVcXElTZKUOAREma4BBRDbLTH2d5aYeZoVinw-CvQAaqs~) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sCV8NFsP5k36OTdK1zQ-kQ~~/AARclBA~/mOnEN1wRoN5FUZ5J3UDlMJ1CYwQVKpc2P2tIZ5PT_itl77VyTGR2EVvKkDk6KG54nbwsspFHzXD-3AYwDqacd8qpRSxyDmD13GdD3e4uFtOgAZQ_WbTQqnLnSRKHopwS0jRmk0Sxrfi761KqZCKDKMuudYjKmnLErsWCsXjeSqBah-5_8xwC-4v3o9onR_FBehG2FZF8OkyQrPlJBLU6AtZ7iIRRevsfOWXBCIwutyQ5C2SxwRXanE-jp_QdkRYVKYNOTK3nJUgO6MaCXFE8p0bY3VCLyPf2PBS2VZ6tM3Okf8_kmRfXWaE0QgLaMtKVcXElTZKUOAREma4BBRDbLTH2d5aYeZoVinw-CvQAaqs~)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

subject: My Mom Dumped Jesus For Jack Murphy (While Keeping Her Faith)
body:
And Thank God She Did.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..ONf2nsHaSpmRxD1rFC39Wi3FJWwrjMZ2NfxJyG7mL9w?) for more

# [My Mom Dumped Jesus For Jack Murphy (While Keeping Her Faith)](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=163305444&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMzA1NDQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY5NjE1OTYsImV4cCI6MTc0OTU1MzU5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gB0Efl_AS39hoFyTgwF6r74wiWFPnFWUUyRriacJFUE)
### And Thank God She Did.
| | [Patrick J. Murphy](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---
| May 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@patrickmurphypa)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=163305444&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMzA1NDQ0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0Njk2MTU5NiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5NTUzNTk2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDM5OTEzMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.hIfXX9VJXphv43fz-9TLcvO92XiCtLZC7CQDJAbZ_-M&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=163305444&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMzA1NDQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY5NjE1OTYsImV4cCI6MTc0OTU1MzU5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gB0Efl_AS39hoFyTgwF6r74wiWFPnFWUUyRriacJFUE&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4399133&post_id=163305444&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMzA1NDQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY5NjE1OTYsImV4cCI6MTc0OTU1MzU5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQzOTkxMzMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gB0Efl_AS39hoFyTgwF6r74wiWFPnFWUUyRriacJFUE)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcGF0cmlja211cnBoeXBhL3AvbXktbW9tLWR1bXBlZC1qZXN1cy1mb3ItamFjay1tdXJwaHk_.fpcdDtkFm96LPJE7vjFQnLsqgT-JZTTm2wdd9QbjIn0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/patrickmurphypa/p/my-mom-dumped-jesus-for-jack-murphy?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I always joke that my mom left Jesus for my dad, Jack Murphy.
It usually gets a laugh, but it's also sort of true.
She was a Catholic nun. And then, one day, she wasn't.
She spent years serving in the Immaculate Heart of Mary order, following in the footsteps of her beloved aunt Mary Logan (aka Sister M St. Thomas), who spent over fifty years as a Catholic nun. My Mom believed she was devoting her life to the highest calling possible. While she was in the convent, her twin brother Billy served in Vietnam with the 101st Airborne. Both wore the uniform of their beloved church and country, respectively.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/afd1ceac-d35a-47f6-8671-2527c1db0082?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My mother at Immaculate Heart of Mary convent, 1965
And then, one day, she left it all behind. Not because she lost faith, but because she found something else worth believing in. One that eventually involved raising three rambunctious kids in a row house in Northeast Philly. She made sure everyone in the neighborhood knew that the Murphys led with values, sending us to Catholic school, and raising first-generation college graduates.
What she never left, though, was her love of our faith, family, and community. A regular devotee to 6:30 a.m. daily mass, she gave us kids a choice: deliver the morning _Philadelphia Inquirer_ before school or join her at church. My brother JJ and I chose the paper route and did it on roller skates and a shopping cart filled with that day's papers.
She may have left the Church's walls, but she never left its principles--later serving as a Eucharistic Minister.
There's a reason all three Murphy kids ended up in public service. My sister has spent over two decades as a public school teacher. My brother served in the Air Force, completing two overseas deployments before continuing his work in public safety down in Florida. I also went into the military and later, political public service. That wasn't a coincidence. That was Margie Rapone Murphy's influence on her kids.
On Saturdays, when all we wanted to do was run outside to play or head to our baseball/basketball/soccer/hockey games, she made us do chores first. Make our beds, vacuum the living room and basement, and dust. Not as punishment, but because pride starts at home. She'd then have us fix up our neighborhood block--sweeping the sidewalks, picking up litter, and helping our elderly neighbors by mowing their lawns or shoveling their steps for free when it snowed. I can still hear the hum of her Hi-Fi stereo blasting her 'Hi God' records, with classics like "I wish I were a butterfly" ("I'd thank you God for giving me wings").
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e28888b8-6cfc-4953-8bd9-740ad7fc0b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My mother and father in Wildwood, New Jersey
That was her gospel: if you wanted the world to be better, you started with your own house and your own street. It was a row house mentality-- expressing gratitude by taking care of the people to your left and right.
On Sundays, there was no skipping church. And there was _definitely_ no hiding in the back pews. First three rows. Always. Dressed in our Sunday best. No shorts and always there for Holy Days of Obligation. Which is probably why now, when I take my own kids to weekly mass, I make sure to sit towards the back as a sign of rebellion. Partly out of guilt, because I'll never be as good as her, but also out of gratitude. Gratitude for a mom who showed us that faith isn't something you talk about--it's something you live. She made sure we understood the importance of faith and family as a treasured gift.
These days, she's happiest when surrounded by her ten grandchildren and three great-grandchildren. Whether it's a family graduation, a special trip to Disney World, or our annual Jersey Shore trip to Wildwood, she's the one keeping everyone fed and sunscreened, holding the newborns more than anyone else, giving the new parents a much-needed break. And somehow, even at 78, she's still one of the first on the dance floor at every family wedding.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c2d57ab-5ddb-4205-a0fd-2c2ecdc2ce5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My mother with just a few of her grandchildren
At West Point, we taught cadets to let your troops eat first. But I saw that kind of leadership long before I wore a uniform. I saw it at our kitchen table. My mother never sat until everyone else's plate was filled---and usually with a second helping on the way.
My mom's legacy is built on little things that added up to a big life.
So this Mother's Day, I want to say thank you to the woman who gave us grit, grace, and the gospel of doing the right thing--even when no one's watching. Who led with action, not just words. Thank you, Margaret "Margie" Rapone Murphy--who left a convent but never left her calling. Who gave us a blueprint for how to live a life with purpose. Who taught us that strength doesn't necessarily mean muscles, but having a selfless heart and leading with love.
She is a person with more heart, drive, and devotion than anyone I've ever known. It's why our daughter Maggie is named after her-- and not surprisingly, they're "besties."
Happy Mother's Day, Mom. I love you. As does everyone who's ever known you. Sorry I didn't become the parish priest you always hoped for--but watching the way you love my kids shows me you know I also made the right choice. Can't wait to be at church with you later this morning-- even if, much to your chagrin, I'm still sitting towards the back pews.
-Patrick
_The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is a Wharton lecturer, Vetrepreneur, and the 32nd Army Under Secretary after earning the Bronze Star for service in Baghdad, Iraq as an All-American with the 82nd Airborne Division --@PatrickMurphyPA on Instagram and Twitter._

body:
__
I’m going to be up front with you: the Patriot Act is an ABUSE OF
POWER that must be repealed.

This is Rep. Anna Paulina Luna - I won’t stand idly by while our
intelligence agencies violate the privacy of _We the People._

__

__

[https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-privacy-wama?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=lp&utm_campaign=20250509_apl_apl-prsp-email-privacy-wama&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&_nlid=test123&utm_term=lrm-active]

That’s why I’m fighting to disarm the deep-state and PROTECT every
Americans’ right against unreasonable search and seizure.

But I can’t do it alone - as one of President Trump’s strongest
allies, career politicians and deep-state puppets are coming out of
the woodwork to stop me.

They’ll do _ANYTHING_ to protect their grip on power and crush any
America-First patriots who stand in their way.

This is good vs evil. Will you lend a hand? >>

body:
While they keep trying to cheat their way into power, we’ll continue protecting the freedom to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107485679/544838524/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250511_f_GOPLosing_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFjOGJiMS02NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KF5jyyMVGITs1ESq-AxP1RxZFne2tGQEDPrB13-eEMs=&emci=aa430f26-002d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=041c8bb1-672e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1037277)

| | Team, let’s be real here: Republicans are on a losing streak at the ballot box. And guess what happens when they start to look bad and lose? _**They panic. **_ In case you missed it: **“Democrat wins special state Senate election in Pennsylvania in major upset”**
_– The Hill, March 25, 2025_ **“Louisiana voters reject 4 constitutional amendments, handing Landry major defeat”**
_– Louisiana Illuminator, March 29, 2025_ **“Republicans sweat over Florida special elections as Democrats make a strong push”**
_– ABC, April 1, 2025_ **“Liberal wins Wisconsin Supreme Court race”**
_– NBC, April 1, 2025_ In key recent elections, from Louisiana to Wisconsin and beyond, voters across the country have been standing together to reject far-right extremism. But instead of grappling with those losses appropriately, **MAGA Republicans have been doubling down on attacking democracy — in other words, trying to cheat. ** Just look at the SAVE Act they passed through the U.S. House — a voter suppression bill that would undoubtedly disproportionately disenfranchise millions of likely Democratic voters by way of particularly impacting young people and Black and Latino Americans. This modern poll tax would add new, unnecessary, and costly citizenship documentation requirements to the voter registration process, effectively shutting down key methods of signing up to vote, including automatic voter registration (AVR) programs. In Georgia, AVR has increased voter registration rates by 20%, with the voter rolls becoming more representative of the state’s population. Our leaders should celebrate that type of progress — not undermine it. All in all, the SAVE Act is a grave assault on the freedom to vote. While violating that bedrock principle of our democracy, it would make key battleground states more vulnerable for Democratic candidates and elected leaders ahead of the 2026 midterm elections — where Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff is “the most endangered Senate Democratic incumbent” according to _Punchbowl News._ [**To help ensure equal access to the ballot box, Fair Fight is organizing to fight against voter suppression and hold anti-democracy forces accountable. Chip in now to help us fight against MAGA’s sore loser tactics >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107485682/544838527/1297451850?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250511_f_GOPLosing_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFjOGJiMS02NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KF5jyyMVGITs1ESq-AxP1RxZFne2tGQEDPrB13-eEMs=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107485685/544838530/1297451850?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250511_f_GOPLosing_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFjOGJiMS02NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KF5jyyMVGITs1ESq-AxP1RxZFne2tGQEDPrB13-eEMs=)
---
We’ve seen it time and again. The far right loses and screams “fraud.” They attempt to pull every trick in the book to prevent voters from using their voices, from educating themselves, and from using their democratic right and freedom to hold elected officials accountable.
**But they’re only doing this because they are scared — _and they’re right to be._ Because we, the people, have power, and MAGA Republicans know it. **
Honestly, extremists are banking on us to give up and give in to their fear-mongering intimidation tactics.
**But rather than fall victim to their baseless claims, we’re working to prevent or mitigate voter suppression tactics, expose GOP attacks on democracy, and elect voting rights champions up and down the ballot. **
**It’s simple, friend — Fair Fight is fighting fairly. MAGA is not. **
[**Help defeat the far right’s anti-democracy agenda now and defend the freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107485689/544838533/1297451850?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250511_f_GOPLosing_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDFjOGJiMS02NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KF5jyyMVGITs1ESq-AxP1RxZFne2tGQEDPrB13-eEMs=)

clean_body: While they keep trying to cheat their way into power, we’ll continue protecting the freedom to vote. | | | Team, let’s be real here: Republicans are on a losing streak at the ballot box. And guess what happens when they start to look bad and lose? They panic. In case you missed it: “Democrat wins special state Senate election in Pennsylvania in major upset” – The Hill, March 25, 2025 “Louisiana voters reject 4 constitutional amendments, handing Landry major defeat” – Louisiana Illuminator, March 29, 2025 “Republicans sweat over Florida special elections as Democrats make a strong push” – ABC, April 1, 2025 “Liberal wins Wisconsin Supreme Court race” – NBC, April 1, 2025 In key recent elections, from Louisiana to Wisconsin and beyond, voters across the country have been standing together to reject far-right extremism. But instead of grappling with those losses appropriately, MAGA Republicans have been doubling down on attacking democracy — in other words, trying to cheat. Just look at the SAVE Act they passed through the U.S. House — a voter suppression bill that would undoubtedly disproportionately disenfranchise millions of likely Democratic voters by way of particularly impacting young people and Black and Latino Americans. This modern poll tax would add new, unnecessary, and costly citizenship documentation requirements to the voter registration process, effectively shutting down key methods of signing up to vote, including automatic voter registration (AVR) programs. In Georgia, AVR has increased voter registration rates by 20%, with the voter rolls becoming more representative of the state’s population. Our leaders should celebrate that type of progress — not undermine it. All in all, the SAVE Act is a grave assault on the freedom to vote. While violating that bedrock principle of our democracy, it would make key battleground states more vulnerable for Democratic candidates and elected leaders ahead of the 2026 midterm elections — where Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff is “the most endangered Senate Democratic incumbent” according to Punchbowl News. = | = We’ve seen it time and again. The far right loses and screams “fraud.” They attempt to pull every trick in the book to prevent voters from using their voices, from educating themselves, and from using their democratic right and freedom to hold elected officials accountable. But they’re only doing this because they are scared — and they’re right to be. Because we, the people, have power, and MAGA Republicans know it. Honestly, extremists are banking on us to give up and give in to their fear-mongering intimidation tactics. But rather than fall victim to their baseless claims, we’re working to prevent or mitigate voter suppression tactics, expose GOP attacks on democracy, and elect voting rights champions up and down the ballot. It’s simple, friend — Fair Fight is fighting fairly. MAGA is not. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all.
