name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Email scandal rocks Shapiro admin
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2b55d7e64f&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Disappearing documents: Shapiro admin deleted accuser’s emails — while senior aides’ records were preserved](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a92c07ad4f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Internal records obtained from Governor Josh Shapiro’s office suggest the email account of a top aide who accused a cabinet secretary of sexual harassment was deleted under suspicious and possibly selective circumstances — and not as part of any routine records policy.

The aide, who resigned in 2023 after lodging the allegation, appears to be the only official whose email records have been entirely wiped from state servers during that period.

The absence of any preserved messages raises sharp questions about whether the Shapiro administration took steps to erase a digital trail tied to a politically sensitive personnel matter — and whether broader email retention practices in the governor’s office are compromised or selectively enforced.

**Why It Matters**. In August 2024, the governor’s spokesman, Manuel Bonder, told the New York Times that Shapiro “‘was not aware of the complaint or investigation until months after the complaint was filed.’”

_Broad + Liberty_ asked who specifically in the chain of command erred by keeping the information from the governor. Bonder did not answer that question. Despite the governor’s office insisting that the accuser’s emails were handled in accordance with policy, the retention schedule in force at the time requires retention of emails from the Office of Legislative Affairs — where she worked — for a minimum of two years or until the end of the legislative session, whichever is longer. Her emails were sought just one year after she left.

Nowhere in Bonder’s response did he point to any portion of the retention schedule that would support his claims. Bonder also did not respond to a follow-up question asking when the accuser’s email account was deleted.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d43e76bf04&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Dem-aligned PACs mail fake Republican sample ballots in MontCo](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=70e9b6f742&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
A local political group supporting four Democratic candidates for the Perkiomen Valley School Board is intentionally attempting to mislead Republican voters according to Montgomery County Republican Committee (MCRC) Chair Christian Nascimento. **[P](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f6b4e3da32&e=b7b3eddce2)**[V Forward](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4c99450c20&e=b7b3eddce2), a political action committee, mailed out green sample ballots to some registered Republican voters with the oval blackened for the Democratic-endorsed school board candidates. **Why It Matters.** The document, entitled “Perkiomen Valley Republican Sample Ballot,” is printed on green paper which Nascimento said the county Republican Party has used since the 1970s or ‘80s, and local Republican voters recognize this as the “official” party communication. To compound the confusion, the fake sample ballot also lists some of the Republican-endorsed candidates for Judge. If Republican voters receive this mailing and check the first two names, Ann Marie Wheatcraft for Superior Court and Matt Wolford for Commonwealth Court, they will[ show](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=acdba50b09&e=b7b3eddce2) as legitimately endorsed by the Republican Party. If voters do not research the school board candidates listed on the fake sample ballot, they will have no way of knowing they are not actually endorsed by the Republican Party but, rather, by the[ Democratic Party](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9a4277f681&e=b7b3eddce2). **Quotable.** “We just want free and fair elections,” said Christian Nascimento, the Montgomery County Republican Committee Chair. “This is a travesty and a blatant attempt to sow confusion in voters.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dd694ead74&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Christine Flowers: An American Pope for the 21st century](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=10189222d9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: May Day kayfabe](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce23cb8df0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Chris Gibbons: The box in the attic](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ee398d21d9&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Four books and one story that changed everything](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=66e5a03e9a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Gettysburg College effort to enroll ‘20% students of color’ prompts federal complaint](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=082618b009&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stephenie Scialabba: It’s time to fix the flawed tax policy hurting independent oil and gas producers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=699dd5cbe5&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Fred Harran: A safer Bucks County: Fully utilizing the Sheriff’s Office for public safety](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cde2c28980&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=71e4f5ffec&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
We’re reading what all the world is reading this week: coverage of the new pope, Leo XIV, the first American to ever hold the office, and a man with local connections through [his time at Villanova University](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a467a65a4d&e=b7b3eddce2). In addition to [a column by our own Christine Flowers](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7a3b56edf3&e=b7b3eddce2), John Allen at Crux gave [a pre-conclave rundown of Cardinal Robert Prevost](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bbfa06e164&e=b7b3eddce2) when he was still considered only a dark horse contender for the throne of St. Peter. _The Chicago Tribune_ covered their native son extensively in articles about [his upbringing](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=edfe8c4425&e=b7b3eddce2) and [his family](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=811b5e36b3&e=b7b3eddce2). Even Barstool Sports is on the Pope beat, tracking down the question of which baseball team holds the new Pope’s loyalty (he’s [a White Sox fan](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f84e6c31c1&e=b7b3eddce2).) Pope Leo’s election is truly an historic occasion for Catholics and, in some ways, for all Americans.****

|
---

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

name: Lily Tang Williams for Congress
subject: Happy Mothers Day
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/happy-mothers-day?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# HAPPY MOTHER’S DAY
**A Tribute to Resilience and Resistance on Mother’s Day**

My mother Huai Bin passed away in November 2020 at the age of 77 in Colorado. Her life in China was tragic, and it took me a long time to write about her life and death because I had to confront the complex feelings and meaning of her legacy.

I used to assume that I was entirely my father’s child. He was a fighter whose strength was like the factory steel he helped produce: firm, resilient, and tough. I spent my life assuming that my defiant nature was the product of my father. Now I am not so sure.

Read more about my mother: [A tribute to resilience and resistance on Mother’s Day | Blaze Media](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=93f4af4fa6&e=c338950e03) “My mother’s legacy is one of defiance. It began with a cry that defied death, lived through compassion that defied pain, and endures in me.”
She wore pink when women were cancelled in Mao's gender-less collective society, because she wanted to look pretty. My mother’s quiet defiance - rooted in pain, lived through love – reflected Christ’s strength. Her sacrifice wasn’t weakness, but grace, so her family could live. A true testament to God’s design.

On this Mother’s Day, I honor her courage, and I will fight for the freedom and quality of life she never had.

**Strong and Feminine**

Congresswoman Maggie Goodlander, my opponent in the next election, voted against keeping men out of women's sports . I signed the pledge standing with women as well as to protect women's private spaces. My mother would be very proud of me defending women and girls and their existence in today's insane world.

You can order my meme T-shirts, mugs and posters in my store: [http://lilytangwilliams-shop.fourthwall.com](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=815432300f&e=c338950e03) Please donate to my campaign: [Link](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=65a7dba713&e=c338950e03) here. **Or, make checks payable to:** Lily4Congress Committee
PO Box 406
Weare, NH 03281
For Freedom and my mother,

---
First, the FCC ordered a politically motivated investigation into NPR and PBS!

Then, Trump signed an order to halt ALL federal funding for NPR and PBS!

_**We can’t let Donald Trump and Elon Musk cancel these critical programs and get away with this attack on the free press!**_

## Trans row: NHS nurse ‘forced out’ of job after expressing gender-critical views online
A NHS nurse was "forced out" of her job after she mocked the transgender flag online. Amy Gallagher, a mental health nurse, is now looking to sue South London and Maudsley NHS Trust, where she worked. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Roger Stone just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption... In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
#

Trump’s longtime political advisor, Roger Stone, just called for me to be charged with treason and executed.
You heard me right.
I called out Trump for his blatant corruption — making millions of dollars from his own crypto coins — and I co-sponsored a bill to make it illegal for the President, the Vice President, administration officials, and members of Congress to do the same.
In response, they sent Roger Stone after me.
When I joined the Navy, I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. I did it again when I was sworn in as Arizona’s United States Senator. I will continue to uphold that oath, and because it matters to our democracy, I will do everything I can to stop the blatant corruption in Washington.
Guys like Donald Trump and Roger Stone are only looking out for themselves. And it’s clear they’re scared of the attention we’re bringing to them and their corrupt deeds.
I’ll be honest with you, though. If Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and now Roger Stone are all lining up against me, it’s going to take a big team to fight back.
[**Please, if you can afford it, make a donation as we take on the corruption in Washington and fight back against the Trump Administration. It adds up fast when lots of people are chipping in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-may25.akVXmo&refcode=em250511-1-500&t=1&akid=6065%2E6688874%2Ezo6P3H)

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: We need a new leader to look out for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
After being forced to stay in Congress, Elise Stefanik is now thinking about running for governor.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88509?refcode=em20250511-8932&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8932%2E614464%2EPymijH)
Peter, with Elise Stefanik potentially running for governor, NY-21 could be a completely open seat.
**[Will you split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today to help us prepare?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88509?refcode=em20250511-8932&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8932%2E614464%2EPymijH)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88509?refcode=em20250511-8932&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8932%2E614464%2EPymijH)**
After being forced to stay in Congress, Elise Stefanik is now thinking about running for governor. It’s clear: **Stefanik is always looking for her next job, so we need a new leader to look out for the North Country.**
That’s exactly why I decided to run for Congress in the first place. We’ve been represented by career politicians for way too long, and we need a representative who understands what families in our community are facing.
**[I’m committed to representing the North Country in Congress, regardless of who my opponent is. Will you split a donation between me and State Democrats Committee today to help us win this race?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88509?refcode=em20250511-8932&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8932%2E614464%2EPymijH)**

clean_body: After being forced to stay in Congress, Elise Stefanik is now thinking about running for governor. Peter, with Elise Stefanik potentially running for governor, NY-21 could be a completely open seat. After being forced to stay in Congress, Elise Stefanik is now thinking about running for governor. It’s clear: Stefanik is always looking for her next job, so we need a new leader to look out for the North Country. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Congress in the first place. We’ve been represented by career politicians for way too long, and we need a representative who understands what families in our community are facing. **Let’s win this—together.**

**—Ken Mitchell**

name: GOTV PAC
subject: 100 Opportunities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
What's happening in Virginia right now is a big deal.
For the first time in recent memory, Democrats are contesting every seat in the Virginia House of Delegates — all 100 districts! That's not just a political milestone; it's a signal that people are mobilizing and not waiting around for permission to fight back.
These races are often decided by just a few hundred votes, which means our work can make all the difference! We have the opportunity to flip red seats blue, protect the Democratic majority in the House of Delegates, and boost turnout for our Democratic gubernatorial nominee, Abigail Spanberger, who's working to flip the governor's mansion.
So, Peter, will you donate just $20 or more to help us fund our targeted phonebank operations in the most winnable, high-impact races across Virginia: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05102025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05102025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05102025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email05102025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email05102025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05102025]
These are the districts that Trump and Elon Musk would love for us to ignore, but we're not going to give them that satisfaction.
Let's go.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05102025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05102025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

body:

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Happy Mother’s Day
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
---
From my family to yours: Happy Mother’s Day!
Jackie and I are incredibly blessed to be raising our seven children together, and not a day goes by that we don’t recognize the strength, love, and grace that mothers bring to our families and our communities.
Today, we’re celebrating the moms who give so much of themselves to make the world a better place, whether in the home, at work, in our schools, or serving others quietly every day. Wishing you and your family a joyful and peaceful Mother’s Day.**[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQyokDGIy40AggidFJuoS84w6fp3bCXcD9aTXRdhxQjtd5gguEPYTsGLVWd6A)**

Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District

name: Shontel Brown
subject: My mother made me who I am today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Happy Mother’s Day!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107498723/544871099/1806897946?refcode=EM_C_250511mothers_M_SB_90DO_3_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGNiZGQzYS03MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVucTi8tDCvqvwSw2XFXpahbvZQvubaQSFIuFRUYgbw=) Happy Mother’s Day, Peter!

By instilling in me the importance of education and perseverance, my mother has helped mold me into the woman I am today. Without her, I would not be in this position, serving as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. I am eternally indebted to her for the example she set for me. Thanks to my mother’s example, I have never allowed the barriers I’ve encountered to stop me from pursuing my goals and blazing my own path. Having her as a role model has inspired me to fight to ensure everyone has access to opportunities, regardless of their background, every day.

To all the incredible mothers out there, you’re appreciated more than you could ever imagine. Enjoy your special day.

Gratefully,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

subject: Imagine a future where mothers didn't have to sacrifice so much...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
In honor of Mother's Day, will you sign your name to tell the Trump administration to provide more programs for families?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107498565/544870768/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiZGQzYS03MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXvF08RRA4TN77FwY6wegHP1GedbRkHUsZ-WRDkTrc0=&emci=fc3fe1c1-192d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=42cbdd3a-702e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21278485)

It’s Mother’s Day, Derek – a time we celebrate all the moms across the country, who sacrifice so much to give us the best life possible.
_But can you imagine a future where mothers didn't have to sacrifice so much?

Where they could rely on paid family leave, like the Pennsylvania Senate just passed?

Where there were programs for more affordable child care?_
The Trump Administration recently proposed a $5,000 baby bonus to new parents. There is a novel’s worth of things that could be said about that but let’s just state the obvious: _Having_ a child is just the start. _Raising_ healthy kids in a healthy family environment requires family friendly policies like paid parental leave, affordable child care, affordable health care, equitable workplace rules, and more.

However, the Trump Administration is dismantling what few support structures exist for families today including abolishing telework for federal employees, shutting down departments which protect workers’ rights, eliminating maternal and child health programs at HHS, cancelling funding for Head Start, threatening SNAP, closing agencies focused on child support enforcement, domestic violence reduction, and more. Not to mention his support of Congressional Republican efforts to cut Medicaid to pay for tax breaks to millionaires.
**This Mother's Day, it's imperative that we stand up on behalf of all moms across the country to provide more programs for working families. As a reliable Democrat in 18326, I'm personally counting on you, Derek, to add your name to my petition below. **
**_[In honor of Mother's Day, will you sign your name to tell the Trump administration to provide more support programs for families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107498574/544870791/-325466281?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1127-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiZGQzYS03MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXvF08RRA4TN77FwY6wegHP1GedbRkHUsZ-WRDkTrc0=&emci=fc3fe1c1-192d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=42cbdd3a-702e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21278485)_**
| | [SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107498576/544870805/-325466281?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1127-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmNiZGQzYS03MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LXvF08RRA4TN77FwY6wegHP1GedbRkHUsZ-WRDkTrc0=&emci=fc3fe1c1-192d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=42cbdd3a-702e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=21278485)

body:
Use your voice to reject Trump’s agenda! >>

| **BREAKING:** President Donald Trump signed an executive order to end public funding of NPR and PBS to stop what he called "biased and partisan news coverage." clean_body: Use your voice to reject Trump’s agenda! >> | BREAKING: President Donald Trump signed an executive order to end public funding of NPR and PBS to stop what he called "biased and partisan news coverage." If grassroots Democrats don't push back aggressively now ,MAGA Republicans could wipe out all federal funding for trusted public outlets like NPR and PBS. This is a part of a coordinated, long-running attack on journalism and the First Amendment. It’s about censorship. It’s about control. And it’s about silencing people that dare to hold them accountable. We absolutely cannot let them demolish these critical media watchdogs or else it will cost us our democracy. | Thank you for fighting back! I’ve watched Hillary pour her heart into everything she does – as a social worker, a lawyer, a Congresswoman, and most importantly, as an incredible mom to our two boys.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107499258/544872600/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2Y2JkZDNhLTcwMmUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMaSw_mGG6SzFHm1FqITLyBTFasaNNQ6HXwMu3b3SY4=&emci=9fc16c6b-002d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=36cbdd3a-702e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045)

Peter, In this moment of constant breaking news and political turbulence, it could be easy to feel overwhelmed or even defeated – but we can’t lose sight of the meaningful progress we've made in the first few months of this year, in the face of all that chaos. The recent Wisconsin Supreme Court race stands as a powerful example of what we can accomplish when we work together. When Republicans — and the billionaires they are beholden to — tried to buy an extreme right-wing majority on Wisconsin’s highest court to act as a “support network” for Donald Trump, Wisconsinites said hell no. Also significant are the Democracy Defender victories in special elections across Pennsylvania, Minnesota, and Virginia. These wins secured Democratic or shared control of key state legislative chambers — outcomes that directly strengthen our ability to fight for fair maps. **While national politics are capturing headlines, the fight for our democracy is ongoing in states across this country. ** Each judicial seat, state legislative chamber, and governor's mansion we win becomes a bulwark against anti-democracy efforts like partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression. Here at the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, we approach this work with both _precision_ and _principle_. As a part of our comprehensive 10 Year Plan, we strategically identify which races are the most important opportunities to most effectively counter gerrymandering and protect our basic freedoms. We endorse pro-democracy candidates. And with your continued support, we provide these Democracy Defenders with the resources they need to win. But critically, the strategy to end gerrymandering also extends beyond electoral politics. With your support, the fair maps movement is developing sophisticated mapping capabilities, building grassroots coalitions, educating the public about redistricting's impact on their communities, holding legislators accountable to their voters, and advancing redistricting reforms at every level of government. [**There is no one I’d rather be standing next to in this effort, and I ask you to power more progress in this fight by making a gift of $30 or more to the NDRC today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107499260/544872601/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AG10yrPlanAppealNOR_email_20250511-NDRC-Tier1-AG10yrPlanAppealNOR_var1&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250511-NDRC-Tier1-AG10yrPlanAppealNOR_var1&utm_campaign=AG10yrPlanAppealNOR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM2Y2JkZDNhLTcwMmUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMaSw_mGG6SzFHm1FqITLyBTFasaNNQ6HXwMu3b3SY4=) Thank you, Eric H. name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: Here’s how I’m fighting for mothers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107499860/544874266/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250511_EN_Mothers_0_6MO_BonnieWatsonColeman_NA_NA_MothersDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTA1NWRlMC03MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jp5D_xq42AHJ5EkWnT2fNc6bu376g-VQ8xshB7jOmFE=&emci=c4055de0-702e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=c9055de0-702e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098) | Happy Mother’s Day! As a mother and a grandmother, I know the importance of the strength and sacrifice of mothers and mother figures everywhere.

Mothers deserve meaningful support that makes a difference in their lives – not just on Mother’s Day, but every day. Their impact is immeasurable, and that’s why I’m fighting to ensure moms have the care and support they need to care for their families and themselves.

This week, I introduced the Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children **(WIC) Collaboration Study Act**. This bill would help improve how state agencies work together, so services like WIC, SNAP, and Medicaid can be more easily accessed for families, and barriers can be removed.

Every family in this country deserves efficient access to the support systems that keep them healthy and secure. This coordination would mean more families receiving nutritious food, resources, and care that they need, not just to survive, but to thrive.

I also reintroduced the **Diaper Affordability Act** because diapers are essential and a basic need, not a luxury. This bill would make the purchase of diapers tax-free and reimbursable through Health Savings Accounts (HSAs).

Families everywhere are struggling to afford diapers, and no one should have to wait to change a baby because of costs. We have to do more on every front to support working families trying to make ends meet – and this is one way we can do that and keep our children safe, clean, and healthy.

I will never stop fighting to help mothers and families across the nation. I hope you take time today to honor and celebrate the women in your lives, and wish you a peaceful and happy Mother’s Day.

Sincerely,

Bonnie Watson Coleman
---
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

name: Team Ilhan
subject: Remember this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
After a ton of hard work and campaigning, our movement defeated Ilhan’s primary challenger
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1631%2E791427%2Eo7qLpm)

Friend — Remember this day?
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250511-1-180&t=2&akid=1631%2E791427%2Eo7qLpm)
August 13th of last year. After a ton of hard work and campaigning, our movement defeated Ilhan’s primary challenger and later sent her back to Congress for another two years.
It was a joyful moment. But it wasn’t an easy campaign; Ilhan herself called it “one of the ugliest, most disgusting campaigns against me that I have ever witnessed.” Millions of dollars were spent to stop Ilhan and it was an uphill battle the entire way.
Now, Ilhan has announced that she’s running for reelection once again, and we can bet that the far-right, AIPAC, corporate interests, and the entire establishment will be watching to see if our movement is still strong.
If we look weak, they may organize their big donors and start lining up behind a conservative candidate who will challenge Ilhan. If we show that thousands of dedicated, grassroots supporters are by our side, they may decide that a primary challenge just isn’t worth it.
That would be a huge boost for Ilhan, and allow her to spend less time campaigning and more time taking on Donald Trump’s administration and fighting for our progressive values.
That’s why we need to report a huge fundraising haul after the next FEC deadline. If we do, eventually we’ll be able to recreate that joyful moment from last year.
Will you help us?
**[Please, make a contribution of just $5 or whatever you can afford today to show that you stand with Ilhan in her campaign for reelection.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250511-1-180&t=3&akid=1631%2E791427%2Eo7qLpm)

name: Taina Pou
subject: A few words about my mother, Nellie Pou
body:
She's an incredible mom and grandma.

| |
---
Team, I'm so proud of my mother, Congresswoman Nellie Pou. Not only is she an incredible mother and role model to me, but she's also an inspirational figure to my son and everyone in our family. My mom has devoted her life to serving her community in North Jersey. She first started her career in public service when she was elected to New Jersey's state legislature. She then went on to continue working diligently for her constituents while in the New Jersey Senate, and is now the first Latina Congresswoman in New Jersey history! As you know, she assembled a campaign at breakneck speed last fall when her mentor and giant, Congressman Bill Pascrell, passed away. Starting her campaign from scratch with only two months to the election showed her dedication and determination. As you've been hearing from Nellie and others on her team, this district has become unexpectedly competitive. Now, as my mom looks ahead to her re-election, she knows that Republicans will spend millions of dollars to try to defeat her and flip this seat to their column. But I know my mom is a fierce fighter, and their efforts will fail. **[It would mean so much to me on this Mother's Day if you could chip in a few bucks to power her campaign. She's been in walls of meetings, hiring staff, and getting us all ready for the tough race to come. clean_body: She's an incredible mom and grandma. | | Team, I'm so proud of my mother, Congresswoman Nellie Pou. Not only is she an incredible mother and role model to me, but she's also an inspirational figure to my son and everyone in our family. My mom has devoted her life to serving her community in North Jersey. She first started her career in public service when she was elected to New Jersey's state legislature. She then went on to continue working diligently for her constituents while in the New Jersey Senate, and is now the first Latina Congresswoman in New Jersey history! As you know, she assembled a campaign at breakneck speed last fall when her mentor and giant, Congressman Bill Pascrell, passed away. Starting her campaign from scratch with only two months to the election showed her dedication and determination. As you've been hearing from Nellie and others on her team, this district has become unexpectedly competitive. Now, as my mom looks ahead to her re-election, she knows that Republicans will spend millions of dollars to try to defeat her and flip this seat to their column. But I know my mom is a fierce fighter, and their efforts will fail. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you, and I look forward to being in this fight with you. — Taina Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

subject: 17 years ago

body:
This Mother's Day, I'm reflecting on where I was about 17 years ago.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107501361/544877883/1276597034?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.11_Mothers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBhNjU0Yy03MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b70GeN-um-DAuXXB3J4KknxuFABWViwn8LV-en8RJOE=) This Mother's Day, I'm reflecting on where I was about 17 years ago.

May 14, 2008, was a busy day. I was a freshman congresswoman, and the House was deep in the weeds of passing the Farm Bill — a huge piece of legislation that we work on every five years to feed our country. Over on the Armed Services Committee, I worked all day to pass a crucial amendment to the bill we were voting on.

All in all, it was a 13-hour day. The last vote took place at 8 p.m. **Around nine hours after leaving the floor of the House, I gave birth to my second son, Henry.**

I was lucky to have a job that allowed me to take leave after I gave birth. But millions of other moms aren't so lucky. That's why I've spent my career fighting relentlessly for the rights of families and women. With Donald Trump and ultra-conservative extremists sabotaging our efforts at every turn, it's never been more important to ensure we have leaders in Congress who are committed to supporting families at the highest level. [**_Please, will you chip in before midnight tonight to help take back our Democratic majority?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107501362/544877884/1276597034?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.11_Mothers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBhNjU0Yy03MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b70GeN-um-DAuXXB3J4KknxuFABWViwn8LV-en8RJOE=)

I was proud to work right up until the day I gave birth. But I'll be the first to tell you, being a mom in Congress isn't easy. **Being a mom isn't easy,_period_ — especially given the lack of protections that our country offers to new parents.**

We're the only industrialized nation in the world that fails to provide paid family or parental leave. Child care has become impossibly unaffordable. The COVID-19 pandemic drove millions of moms out of the labor market. Being a parent in America is incredibly challenging and expensive.

I've spent years pushing for legislation to make it easier to raise children in this country, and I've built coalitions of support across party lines. But obstruction from the far-right has stopped us from passing the most substantial measures.

I'll never stop fighting for families — and I am certain that real change is possible. I need people like you to step up and help take back our majority in the midterms so we can continue the fight for families and women. [**_Please, will you donate $5 now to help flip the Senate and defeat extremists?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107501363/544877885/1276597034?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.11_Mothers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBhNjU0Yy03MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b70GeN-um-DAuXXB3J4KknxuFABWViwn8LV-en8RJOE=) | | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107501364/544877886/1276597034?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.11_Mothers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBhNjU0Yy03MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b70GeN-um-DAuXXB3J4KknxuFABWViwn8LV-en8RJOE=)
---
With love and gratitude,

Kirsten
* * *
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107501365/544877887/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.11_Mothers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBhNjU0Yy03MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b70GeN-um-DAuXXB3J4KknxuFABWViwn8LV-en8RJOE=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. [**Please, donate today to make sure my team and I can continue securing crucial progress on the issues that matter the most and help flip the Senate blue in 2026.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107501366/544877888/1865269831?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.11_Mothers-Day_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTBhNjU0Yy03MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b70GeN-um-DAuXXB3J4KknxuFABWViwn8LV-en8RJOE=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I didn’t fight to turn around and lose
body:
Peter, I didn’t fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year. I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last. |
---
Peter,

I didn't fight every day of 2024 to Secure the Senate to turn around and lose it next year.

I traveled to battleground states, rallied voters, and, with your generous support, raised critical funds for exceptional candidates. **Together, we built a U.S. Senate majority to last.**

**But now, the Democrats are gearing up for the fight of their lives.** After a terrible 2024 for the Left, they are doubling down and raising more money than I ever thought was possible to defeat us in the midterms. They are already mobilizing for 2026 with a fierce determination to undo our victories.

**They're coming for us, Peter, and this time, it's personal.**

**[I'm up for re-election in 2026, and there is no doubt my seat will be the Left's #1 target for standing with President Trump.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a899eaead4f8405abe4c4933f729ead5&_e=H_Dc8esoskHE0PXshHDw3bpb6xSucAXMJXsllVvM1i77_WPKD6MGTEV8tFrhYCjoTGaxPEmsXw88AOVlASvfYDUsi-eUFjADbuRnAVaNEZVclvdklIzioBmuI4ie9s46OgKQzvpvOhi2mDofT9AIss_fGiV5worNC-BJE_wO0XNqYyGuijVh2XIJ_rcrTOMtf5rhS9FDIkEp8_y-4oBS4atF9SD1Oq7X005nkmwAPKJlhvUtMklitA4Jts1swGNCFBlZF3f1zY7bgGMs4cADA9B-ygfN1aNtJIkSTYzvLfqgUtNPIvE-qSQd5WU6aIW3m9nHhOE0oOG8PDJ3uYRO1bP0t8aMEK4vzOQFG1eKWU98LISm_ZN3-QVgq5U5Bvrr6JDuo4mzUwUqmgb2-oVQ-wqOu__CRzq7t2wNdhjXRPshFHxdQPOMQymkuHMqjiQ0)**

They want to flip South Carolina **Blue,** end my work alongside President Trump, and dismantle everything we've achieved together.

**We cannot let the Democrats succeed.**

| [**KEEP SOUTH CAROLINA RED**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a899eaead4f8405abe4c4933f729ead5&_e=H_Dc8esoskHE0PXshHDw3bpb6xSucAXMJXsllVvM1i77_WPKD6MGTEV8tFrhYCjoTGaxPEmsXw88AOVlASvfYDUsi-eUFjADbuRnAVaNEZVclvdklIzioBmuI4ie9s46OgKQzvpvOhi2mDofT9AIss_fGiV5worNC-BJE_wO0XNqYyGuijVh2XIJ_rcrTOMtf5rhS9FDIkEp8_y-4oBS4atF9SD1Oq7X005nkmwAPKJlhvUtMklitA4Jts1swGNCFBlZF3f1zY7bgGMs4cADAzvkY3Ox5fYJPWGJLLfX07NARoCZl5UBE-O-u0YqZYpwvd84i0oqABMXoYFsSb1eaX9TQywFZQ4t3-JQ1WsBA8W8XoVmam9fafiOQLyrGgGguk170iBcZAWfFbc22LnofOqhUVYcskPux5UakTQ7YRTg11jUasZC-w7lIKLQ4qEQ)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Shot PAC
body:
The best gift we could give all moms is a system that prioritizes their health, well-being, and success. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107502786/544882077/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDYwNDY4NC03NjJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69gqMOTqLg0sRhBfMjHgI4BbA2eG0dAGxFkECxQ1fEE=)
---
Hi Peter — I’ll be quick so you can get back to the celebrations, but I wanted to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Mother’s Day. While today is meant to be a day of recognition and love, as a mom, I can’t help but reflect on the current state of our country. Trump and his extreme administration are whipping out dangerous policy after dangerous policy, and moms — new, working, and everyone in between — bear the brunt. The best gift we could give to all moms is a system that prioritizes their health, well-being, and success. Programs like universal child care, affordable health care, and paid family leave. And that means we’ve got to take back the House in 2026 — **which starts now. ** **[For all of the moms and mother figures out there, I hope you’ll chip in a few dollars today to support my work. Because you know what they say — a mother’s work is never done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107502787/544882078/-1036732795?refcode=AU_FSP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDYwNDY4NC03NjJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69gqMOTqLg0sRhBfMjHgI4BbA2eG0dAGxFkECxQ1fEE=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107502788/544882079/-549607442?amount=&refcode=AU_FSP_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDYwNDY4NC03NjJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=69gqMOTqLg0sRhBfMjHgI4BbA2eG0dAGxFkECxQ1fEE=)

I hope you all have a great Mother’s Day.
— Katherine
Fair Shot PAC
600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180
Washington, DC 20003

name: DASS Legal Fund
subject: NEW: Trump shuts down vital election security program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107502790/544882083/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjYwNDY4NC03NjJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBJw_9_s3z-0NueReR56M1e20m9lZHXYlpt7UDT6I0U=)
**➤➤ NEW: Trump shuts down vital election security program** Friend, The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing and Analysis Center (EI-ISAC) united over 1,300 election and law enforcement officials nationwide to monitor and block threats to our elections. **Now, because of Trump, EI-ISAC is gone.** This isn’t just an administrative change – it’s a direct assault on the integrity of our electoral process. By dismantling EI-ISAC, Trump has weakened our nation’s ability to detect and prevent cyber threats targeting our elections. **You don’t have to take it from us – hear it straight from our Secretaries of State:** | **“We’ve lost information sharing among election officials nationwide.”**
_– Shenna Bellows, Maine Secretary of State_

**“The very existence of these agencies is, in itself, a deterrent. If they’re gone, we’re going to have a lot more problems.” **
_– Adrian Fontes, Arizona Secretary of State_
---
At DASS, we’re committed to defending our democracy against these reckless actions. But we can’t do it alone. Your support is crucial to help us counter these threats and ensure free and fair elections.

clean_body: | = ➤➤ NEW: Trump shuts down vital election security program Friend, The Elections Infrastructure Information Sharing and Analysis Center (EI-ISAC) united over 1,300 election and law enforcement officials nationwide to monitor and block threats to our elections. Now, because of Trump, EI-ISAC is gone. This isn’t just an administrative change – it’s a direct assault on the integrity of our electoral process. By dismantling EI-ISAC, Trump has weakened our nation’s ability to detect and prevent cyber threats targeting our elections. You don’t have to take it from us – hear it straight from our Secretaries of State: | “We’ve lost information sharing among election officials nationwide.” – Shenna Bellows, Maine Secretary of State “The very existence of these agencies is, in itself, a deterrent. If they’re gone, we’re going to have a lot more problems.” – Adrian Fontes, Arizona Secretary of State At DASS, we’re committed to defending our democracy against these reckless actions. She cheers us on at soccer matches.
She sings her heart out at concerts.
She plans the most unforgettable family trips.

From our Girl Scout troop to the CIA, Congress, and soon the Governor's office, there's _nobody_ in the world like her, and there's _nobody_ more capable of getting things done for Virginia families.

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: Protecting women’s basic freedoms
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107503296/544882973/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU3ZTM3OC03NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2aEdH92AywXQzMVpON1L3rEjgRtMsDjGuUfJ3E8H9Y=&emci=5857e378-772e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5e57e378-772e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5944223)
Peter, I’m running for Congress for a lot of reasons. But one of the biggest is that I cannot accept that my generation will have less rights over our bodies than my mom’s generation did. **Everyone deserves the right to make their own decisions about their health and family planning without government interference. Efforts to legislate otherwise are hypocritical – and just plain wrong.** Derrick Van Orden has previously campaigned on a total abortion ban and compared abortion to genocide. And he’s called to punish doctors who provide reproductive care. **That’s why we've got to stay on offense.** [**I’ll never put women’s rights on the chopping block. If you’re with me, chip in $3 today to make clear that a woman’s future is however she damn chooses it to be.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107503297/544882974/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU3ZTM3OC03NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2aEdH92AywXQzMVpON1L3rEjgRtMsDjGuUfJ3E8H9Y=) | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107503298/544882975/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU3ZTM3OC03NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2aEdH92AywXQzMVpON1L3rEjgRtMsDjGuUfJ3E8H9Y=)****
---
I am honored to once again have the support of EMILYs List, the leading organization dedicated to electing pro-choice candidates.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107503299/544882976/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU3ZTM3OC03NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2aEdH92AywXQzMVpON1L3rEjgRtMsDjGuUfJ3E8H9Y=)
And in Congress, I'll work to codify _Roe vs. Wade_ into federal law and protect other reproductive rights.
[**With your support, we can elect the first woman to represent WI-03. Rush a $3 donation to help me defeat Derrick Van Orden, flip the House blue, and protect abortion rights for all.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107503300/544882977/-2087246159?refcode=em-5.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU3ZTM3OC03NzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2aEdH92AywXQzMVpON1L3rEjgRtMsDjGuUfJ3E8H9Y=)
Together, we can restore the change our mothers sacrificed for.
Rebecca

clean_body: | Peter, I’m running for Congress for a lot of reasons. But one of the biggest is that I cannot accept that my generation will have less rights over our bodies than my mom’s generation did. Everyone deserves the right to make their own decisions about their health and family planning without government interference. Efforts to legislate otherwise are hypocritical – and just plain wrong. Derrick Van Orden has previously campaigned on a total abortion ban and compared abortion to genocide. And he’s called to punish doctors who provide reproductive care. That’s why we've got to stay on offense. = | **=** I am honored to once again have the support of EMILYs List, the leading organization dedicated to electing pro-choice candidates. = And in Congress, I'll work to codify Roe vs. Wade into federal law and protect other reproductive rights. = Together, we can restore the change our mothers sacrificed for. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dearest Friends,

This Mother’s Day, I am sending warm wishes to the mothers, grandmothers and mother figures in our lives and am reminded of my own mother in this challenging moment for our country. My mom taught me that mothers are our Guardian Angels and that we carry them always in our hearts – whether or not we are blessed to have them with us.

As a mother of five and grandmother of ten, I believe our children are our most precious gift and responsibility. That is why I work alongside my Democratic House Colleagues to create a better world For The Children, including a safe present and promising future for them.

To that end, we must empower women with sound policy, including health care security, affordable child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, a quality public education with respect for our teachers, and equal pay.

Celebrating the beauty and diversity of our families in San Francisco and across America as we come together around our shared values, we can and we will preserve our Democracy and secure the brighter future for our children that they deserve.

On this special day, I share with you a special prayer that my mother, Nancy D’Alesandro, wrote for her mother.

Prayer written by Nancy Pelosi's mother, Nancy D'Alesandro, for her mother [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/20250511_em_ex_b1_np4c_main.png]

Thank you and God bless you. Happy Mother’s Day!
NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Restore our traditions of empowered citizenship
body:
The Rare Phenomenon of Citizenship

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dc404ef0caa49edafec0cd772cf6e66&_e=5Z9ZW17O2RAW1d7wBNCU7AvKXK_-wE5xFyR7IQiBJIQO_UyCMtk_hSXSEa42kcSnepo7cUnsxP8tJjBAFTT9r-0ndobrdOZTzTfNhe7jwPziJ9V7VRc3csptb0Pqjr7yhypN98DR6wXyY8zDNyTIKBjBg-vXXC-BaYstg6DZ1O1P44dmx8HJh5lyN2EqFH0RdphY1vWQ45MEPek1x93e973DIT-vEC1MjP52v6FtxRawc0sxZq5-N0LuiDQmWCGSQ8FywUkNYIjonx9qP4ROAzizpUVtvmYJQLHVcJ-lKwVZVVciT7srh2RldDdXje4vN04bJDLQvPnAgs_4xdoA4grrSi0a44EhtaM3weIjrA3hk3Bw7NXY709cHmJ0jPhXFJ2xuHQDGWhtFLIFiATGXQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dc404ef0caa49edafec0cd772cf6e66&_e=5Z9ZW17O2RAW1d7wBNCU7AvKXK_-wE5xFyR7IQiBJIQO_UyCMtk_hSXSEa42kcSnepo7cUnsxP8tJjBAFTT9r-0ndobrdOZTzTfNhe7jwPziJ9V7VRc3csptb0Pqjr7yhypN98DR6wXyY8zDNyTIKBjBg-vXXC-BaYstg6DZ1O1P44dmx8HJh5lyN2EqFH0RdphY1vWQ45MEPek1x93e973DIT-vEC1MjP52v6FtxRawc0sxZq5-N0LuiDQmWCGS8UI4r3iotER4CkLjIN6-CwzBO5tu-_su4jmQsRpwYig7td_ncl1W8KVgI5Cfd3PdEO10lqa9hHBjRl7gaXvJAFF8ePvHBy8aO6UUUni7PeLXmTZS3gSJtF-BwZgsJYEiAMq2v1ZUSp4Gz8Yld7h-Ww%3D%3D)** ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.
---
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0dc404ef0caa49edafec0cd772cf6e66&_e=5Z9ZW17O2RAW1d7wBNCU7AvKXK_-wE5xFyR7IQiBJIQO_UyCMtk_hSXSEa42kcSnepo7cUnsxP8tJjBAFTT9r-0ndobrdOZTzTfNhe7jwPziJ9V7VRc3csptb0Pqjr7yhypN98DR6wXyY8zDNyTIKBjBg-vXXC-BaYstg6DZ1O1P44dmx8HJh5lyN2EqFH0RdphY1vWQ45MEPek1x93e973DIT-vEC1MjP52v6FtxRawc0sxZq5-N0LuiDQmWCGS73kr4frJks78hms8FOfD5UHS3qOspqbzD0SUtV9Htx-dwhDn6q8yBJeyEvlwXPnvaSniyWwGhtjLW5-L_4YVpWFAW6VzNwtfX-NUBTgbdA0gU0fyhhFZ7h2xeNE9iPZB4Oi5_c1zpGGdyV5vU8u0YA%3D%3D)
---
| | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

name: Rob Bonta
subject: My mom is my hero
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250511&t=1&akid=1782%2E1088799%2ERTArk4)
Happy Mother’s Day to all the moms and mother-figures out there — including the love of my life and mother of our three kids, Mia; my amazing mother-in-law, Magali; and my own incredible mom, Cynthia!
**My mom is one of my heroes.** A true social justice warrior who devoted her life to fighting for what’s right, including fighting for the restoration of democracy in the Philippines, her home country, and fighting for justice, fair pay, and food and water breaks for farm workers while organizing for the United Farm Workers of America, alongside labor icons Dolores Huerta, Cesar Chavez, and Philip Vera Cruz. To this day, my mom continues to inspire and mentor young activists working to create a better future for us all.
My mom first came to the U.S. in 1965 by way of a three-week-long boat ride from the Philippines. Decades later, she became an American citizen so she could vote for me in my first election, and every one since then. She’s my biggest cheerleader and has always believed in me. Throughout my life, she’s taught me to never stop fighting for justice and to always love and serve your community.
I love you and appreciate you so much, Mom!
Thank you to all of the hard-working mothers, grandmothers, aunts, and mother-figures out there — I hope you’re able to enjoy this special day surrounded by your loved ones.
Best,
Rob

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: This Mother’s Day, I’m recommitting to the fight for mothers and families.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Medicaid
body:
We’re fighting for paid leave, affordable childcare, and more. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWw9UPWw9cDvr4DZFxXjL9n1Lphj4MvxGBhrCVMhbtYUBdGxIH9j4B9xRgSW5HIDci_rhsIPfXNG60y8HlEdaUXpVlRQfJAJP099ypdYqYua-WWEX8XNt_Sy711-eUdn4YxT7NcZhkM1xam4pxAezLhu7k_pCuof_z5vzxCBew2BMjiPvdHayPFmOGiyfPjaWVP3Wkvp7s21_qyL_K1y6-joN1rKBM3Z-kYit-yZbdetYp7zMJNZ9hGxp-t-NG-OCD8puqJiEsdYDTvS97KIQQJg/4ge/gKSe4BT2RKi_2CqufHcl7w/h0/h001.H3-RuYf9mVQZPSdXk3G8WcdqJeal9fJMdubso5GutvE)
---
Friend, This Mother’s Day, I’m recommitting to the fight for mothers and families. I started the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress to advocate for working parents and mothers of color. We’re fighting for equal pay, paid family and medical leave, affordable childcare, quality early education, and policies to fix urgent disparities in Black maternal health. When Trump froze and delayed funding for Head Start programs, he jeopardized crucial support for 800,000 children under the age of 5—including meals, healthcare, and childcare. I led the Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending him a letter demanding he restore funding. We then saw immediate improvements to help over 50 Head Start centers access their funding. But the threat continues, and I promise to continue defending these vital programs from Trump’s attacks. Now, Republicans are working on a budget with the largest-ever cuts to Medicaid and food assistance, all to pay for tax breaks to billionaires. Almost half of all U.S. births are paid for by Medicaid. Half of all children in my state of Michigan rely on Medicaid for their healthcare, as do 60% of elderly adults. So I’m joining colleagues to try to force a vote in the House of Representatives to block these cuts. Meanwhile, Trump just requested the largest military budget in the history of our country: Over $1 trillion for war and death, while Americans sleep on the streets, die from a lack of healthcare coverage, and ration their insulin. Our government always has funding for the military defense industry, but not our families. So I’m leading legislation to block members of Congress from owning stock in defense contractors. Elected officials should serve the people rather than their stock portfolios. Our movement is growing, demanding our government stop spending taxpayer dollars on endless wars, and instead invest in people’s needs. For example, we have enough money to house everyone, provide universal healthcare, and remove every lead pipe in our country that is poisoning our children. To protect our right to clean water, I started the Congressional Get the Lead Out Caucus, created a $1.1 billion fund to stop water shutoffs early in the pandemic, and passed historic amendments in the House (which unfortunately weren’t signed into law) to provide $23 billion to fully replace dangerous lead-contaminated water pipes. Last year, we successfully pushed federal agencies to begin replacing lead-contaminated service lines. I’ve also led transformative legislation like the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would create an expansive universal child benefit and provide monthly payments of $428 per child directly to families, for each child between the ages of 0 and 18. This would also cover the lowest-wealth families, who are traditionally left out of the tax credit system. With most Americans living paycheck to paycheck, direct payments like this are essential to survival. We know that the most effective and efficient way to reduce poverty and stimulate the economy is by directly giving people money—so that’s what our federal government should be doing. The government should also end medical debt, utility debt, education debt, and more. I worked with the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to change the lives of 15 million Americans by removing $50 billion in medical debt from their credit reports. And now I’m pushing to defend this progress from Trump’s attacks. I believe in the power of the people resisting this presidential administration. Right now, we must defend current life-saving programs from the billionaires trying to steal from us. But we can’t stop there. Now’s the time to ramp up our demands for an expanded investment in people’s basic needs. I will never stop fighting for the government and society that we all deserve, where families of all backgrounds can thrive with dignity. If you’d like to pitch into my campaign, please use the button below. Thank you so much for fighting alongside me. Wishing you and your loved ones a happy Mother’s Day, Rashida [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtjzbjFBpR7JpBHI31l9kbTssL2iCd_LDl88OA1cO_uPZTh_4qb-dDV4KslVIGGFBvuyyaFVqhBAt39x-ueL4ETixkrokMRagJduoaIQcazkdCbSCvu5ojkJbTeHPEa_7nOqW0462ZMHA4Km0A7NmCZNZLwHX6s56ngIPXrF_gn1b42CGJ5mwTdz7b-jj6mgzMWNE3mPDDoNYOuNQkUvF6Nbxc90wqpSWDtLjdvzqQYqsNYhIXOR2vwPL7FXUqItjV1B6Mga-dM3pFYjJD9Wn27Lx41b5hc6luBHOx9FsV9Osm1MyufxLdYNEFPRegh1FphpOCC2jqHeQ6bqO2-1i9ToBYX6-bob1J2YrIRRwFfwUKQ8v0fBCoKKyU5-40MR2YAtF00040Cxqb6PNu0-yDE24I7qpyN3zsszlDli5iQ7OkOOWYRcrUNcUZccHW9r-4/4ge/gKSe4BT2RKi_2CqufHcl7w/h1/h001.wn99po5oLbQyzgb3hM-kbeoxya82yAwFug-uw4UJAdQ)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Happy Mother’s Day, Colorado!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/support-expanding-child-tax-credit [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/support-expanding-child-tax-credit]
Hi friends,
Happy Mother’s Day! I’ll be spending the day with my wife, Susan, the mother of our three daughters, Caroline, Halina, and Anne, and, of course, Bandit and Captain Flint!
Susan has spent her career advocating for land preservation and sustainability here in Colorado. She is the backbone of our family and the best mother I could imagine for our girls. I'm endlessly in awe of her.
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/support-expanding-child-tax-credit [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/support-expanding-child-tax-credit]
While we spend the day celebrating all the mothers and maternal figures in our lives, we also recognize the many challenges they face in our country.
In an economy that has been stacked in favor of folks at the top, too many moms are struggling to stay afloat and support their families.
That’s why I am working to expand the Child Tax Credit permanently, so more moms and families can benefit. When we passed an enhanced Child Tax Credit in 2021, it became one of the most significant tax cuts for working families in American history. It helped cut childhood poverty nearly in half and gave moms some breathing room at the end of every month. After we passed it, Colorado moms told me repeatedly how the monthly tax credit reduced their stress and helped them afford rent, food, and school supplies.
Unfortunately, Republicans in the Senate blocked us from making that tax cut permanent. But, 12 states—mostly led by Democratic governors—stepped up and passed state versions of the expanded Child Tax Credit. In Colorado, we passed a tax credit for working families of up to $3,200 for young children and up to $2,400 for children between 6-16 years old.
I’ll continue to do everything I can to support moms and maternal figures in Colorado and across the country by pushing for the policies that improve their lives. If you are with us, add your name to our petition demanding that Washington permanently expand the Child Tax Credit. >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/support-expanding-child-tax-credit]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/support-expanding-child-tax-credit]
Together, we can end childhood poverty and build an economy that works for everyone.
Happy Mother’s Day,
Michael

clean_body: [] Hi friends, Happy Mother’s Day! I’ll be spending the day with my wife, Susan, the mother of our three daughters, Caroline, Halina, and Anne, and, of course, Bandit and Captain Flint! Susan has spent her career advocating for land preservation and sustainability here in Colorado. She is the backbone of our family and the best mother I could imagine for our girls. I'm endlessly in awe of her. [] While we spend the day celebrating all the mothers and maternal figures in our lives, we also recognize the many challenges they face in our country. In an economy that has been stacked in favor of folks at the top, too many moms are struggling to stay afloat and support their families. That’s why I am working to expand the Child Tax Credit permanently, so more moms and families can benefit. When we passed an enhanced Child Tax Credit in 2021, it became one of the most significant tax cuts for working families in American history. It helped cut childhood poverty nearly in half and gave moms some breathing room at the end of every month. After we passed it, Colorado moms told me repeatedly how the monthly tax credit reduced their stress and helped them afford rent, food, and school supplies. Unfortunately, Republicans in the Senate blocked us from making that tax cut permanent. But, 12 states—mostly led by Democratic governors—stepped up and passed state versions of the expanded Child Tax Credit. In Colorado, we passed a tax credit for working families of up to $3,200 for young children and up to $2,400 for children between 6-16 years old. I’ll continue to do everything I can to support moms and maternal figures in Colorado and across the country by pushing for the policies that improve their lives. If you are with us, add your name to our petition demanding that Washington permanently expand the Child Tax Credit. >> [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Together, we can end childhood poverty and build an economy that works for everyone. Happy Mother’s Day, Michael [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. TO: Senator Elizabeth Warren
FROM: A proud supporter
Subject: THANK YOU! Dear Sen. Warren,

**THANK YOU for leading the charge to save Social Security!**

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are TERRIFIED of strong Democrats like you — that’s why you’re at the top of their revenge list.

Please know that millions of Americans have your back. I REFUSE to stand idly by and let my hard-earned Social Security be stolen by MAGA billionaires!

**We know Trump and Musk will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to destroy Social Security — but they don’t have an army of grassroots support behind them the way that you do!**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90073?t=9&akid=19821%2E878179%2EyFYjmG) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS LETTER AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90073?t=10&akid=19821%2E878179%2EyFYjmG)

| Did you hear? _California’s National parks could be coming under the ax soon._ **Literally.** The Trump Administration is pushing for all of California’s national parks to be opened up for expanded logging operations. This so-called “emergency” order calls for the production of 25% more lumber, with California being one of the states most heavily impacted. **[That’s why we need to know ASAP: Do you believe we should begin chopping down the forests in our national parks to meet Donald Trump’s “emergency” goal? We are hoping to get at least 17 more responses from 95811 to get a statistically significant sample:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107506738/544893727/1896670706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDAyMGMzOS03ZDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foS5_HGL03DPUhK3MFK0rD13yfm8whLB5v8GEDXXjsg=&emci=a0fef1d5-202d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a4020c39-7d2e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=560478)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107506739/544893728/1896670706?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDAyMGMzOS03ZDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=foS5_HGL03DPUhK3MFK0rD13yfm8whLB5v8GEDXXjsg=&emci=a0fef1d5-202d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=a4020c39-7d2e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=560478) National forests started being created in 1891 as part of a conservation effort to protect watersheds and forests for drinking water and timber supply — after heavy overlogging threatened both. But now Donald Trump is looking to boost lumber supply and the logging industry by chopping down swaths of forest in our national parks. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: My new leadership position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I want you to hear the big news directly from me.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position__**
---
Peter,
---
I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress!
---
**This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election.**
---
_I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda._
---
We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country!
---
But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility...
---
**_...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority._**
---
We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible._
---
**That is why, in my capacity as the _NEW_ Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! **
---
_If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match._
---
[**Please make a contribution of ANY amount to claim your 500% MATCH now that I’ve been officially appointed as the Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/pQ7EKYw6mycidedQgB6ozcsL6PkOiS-sBsshIDqDTZ9yF_oKKaxJiErJOfXpiPqHbEWTa7i1RRQh0uwkQs7LlL_ZeZAyMora7CblnozZGw0WrfiG17-OzOavd-peKtyTd4Ybt9njdB5qahHDPJzpQBd50cylr__AuVrJeVcqJ7eyBek1ocRznU4NvBcEhE8xL_XweC3Q_WF71Yls5uZ0lGQC4c4WKrvgoXA5T4ZrM-WvVKJ53bpexNPnVnE501ZTWWRGGhfhi137lh5lN6sgUiQEo8py2zLHGlNQHzB92LKkSe7kyW8EQ1vmjxbPrJSAZvPVH2VnxkcHT8_ziLVUTQTU93EHYmMxmL0DAzrn_4isE3bW4C5I-BTiR04z_Eq3R9AqHi0XH8BQCtI_lkqkT00qSf7wFcnQFkQtkvSCJ1RfrVyDilmH2-RiWmM56NnDopF_8FYepsT3djG6ha3s6zkbolJf0i4YY-vADAMtCz-ud6U/YqYMLm0R6fEXzth9RuM7iplZjQIORVV9/8)
