clean_body: I want you to hear the big news directly from me. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position Peter, I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress! This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election. I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda. We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country! But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility... ...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority. We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible. That is why, in my capacity as the NEW Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Wishing you and your loved ones a wonderful Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
| Peter — On Mother's Day, I find myself reflecting on the countless ways the mothers in my life have shaped who I am today. Today is an opportunity to express gratitude for the love, strength, and dedication that mothers bring into our lives. I am incredibly fortunate to have been raised by a mother whose career in journalism was nothing short of remarkable. From her role at PBS as a television journalist to becoming the first female bureau chief at CNBC, her journey is a testament to perseverance and honesty. **Her commitment to her craft not only broke barriers but also inspired me to live freely and strive for positive change.** Whether accompanying her on shoots as a kid or learning from her stories, her example has been a cornerstone in my journey, and it reminds me that true impact often comes from resilience and authenticity. Today, I also want to honor my wonderful wife, Caroline, the mother of our two children. From the moment we met, I knew Caroline was someone special. Her deep roots in North Carolina, where her family has lived for seven generations, have only strengthened our bond and commitment to this incredible state. Caroline's dedication to our family and community never ceases to inspire me. **Her strength and passion for a better North Carolina motivate me every day.** Together, we've embarked on this journey to make a difference, and her encouragement and commitment are invaluable as we work to create a better future for our children and families across North Carolina. Mother's Day is a celebration of the boundless spirit that mothers like mine and Caroline embody. Their strength drives us forward, whether it's breaking barriers or nurturing dreams, and their love binds us together as a family and community. While today is a special opportunity to acknowledge their impact, I am grateful every day for the extraordinary women who inspire us through their resilience and devotion. Wishing you and your loved ones a wonderful Mother's Day filled with love and appreciation. name: Ted Cruz
subject: Brace yourself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: The kind of world I want to leave my kids
body:
What I'm thinking about this Mother’s Day |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107508764/544900759/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE525_20250511_MothersDay_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056068&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTE3MWJmOS04MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ek4QYKwjqcssTEnvuZuzh-u1To4vB3d3gyPeX_dmeRs=) Hi Peter,

Happy Mother's Day from all of us at EMILYs List!

This Mother's Day, I'm thinking about the kind of world I want to leave my kids — a world where everyone has the freedom to make their own choices and every mother has access to the care, opportunity, and support she needs.

I'm also thinking about the children across the country who are watching helplessly as Republican extremists try to rip away our rights. Children who are watching the recklessness and chaos out of Washington make their families' lives harder.

We owe it to the future generation to meet this moment — _and that's the driving force behind my work here at EMILYs List._

**Every day, we work to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will stand up, speak out, and take back power so we can lead the way toward a future where all of our children can thrive.**

Because we know that when women lead, everyone benefits — and when mothers have a seat at the table, families across the country are stronger for it.

****[**So, today, on Mother's Day, will you donate to help elect and reelect the women who will create a better future for all of us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107508765/544900761/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE525_20250511_MothersDay_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056068&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTE3MWJmOS04MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ek4QYKwjqcssTEnvuZuzh-u1To4vB3d3gyPeX_dmeRs=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107508767/544900763/-1686146655?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE525_20250511_MothersDay_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056068&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTE3MWJmOS04MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ek4QYKwjqcssTEnvuZuzh-u1To4vB3d3gyPeX_dmeRs=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107508769/544900764/-1686146655?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFE525_20250511_MothersDay_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056068&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTE3MWJmOS04MDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ek4QYKwjqcssTEnvuZuzh-u1To4vB3d3gyPeX_dmeRs=)

clean_body: What I'm thinking about this Mother’s Day | = Hi Peter, Happy Mother's Day from all of us at EMILYs List! This Mother's Day, I'm thinking about the kind of world I want to leave my kids — a world where everyone has the freedom to make their own choices and every mother has access to the care, opportunity, and support she needs. I'm also thinking about the children across the country who are watching helplessly as Republican extremists try to rip away our rights. Children who are watching the recklessness and chaos out of Washington make their families' lives harder. We owe it to the future generation to meet this moment — and that's the driving force behind my work here at EMILYs List. Every day, we work to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will stand up, speak out, and take back power so we can lead the way toward a future where all of our children can thrive. Because we know that when women lead, everyone benefits — and when mothers have a seat at the table, families across the country are stronger for it. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. clean_body: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. | | | | | ---|--- Our team has identified the cycle’s best and most consequential opportunities to build durable Democratic power in state legislatures, and I’m so excited to share our new target map with you: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 Battlegrounds: Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the slimmest of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 Power Building Chambers: Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 Watch List: Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State Dems are working daily to lower costs, address real concerns, and improve the everyday lives of folks like you in places like your state. That’s why it’s vital that we fund our strategy to defend our majorities, elect strong Democratic leaders, and invest in ultra-competitive races nationwide. Thank you for being part of this movement. Together, Heather Heather Williams President Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee P.S. To learn more about our long-term strategy and target map, you can read our detailed memo here: | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Fariba Ansari
subject: Yassamin makes me so proud, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey there, Peter, this is Fariba — Yassamin's mom! I hope you won’t mind me reaching out today. My daughter, Yassamin, gets a lot of support from people like yourself, but I won’t lie — I’m her #1 fan. She makes me endlessly proud with the work she does, standing up for what’s right and fighting for people every day on Capitol Hill. This Mother’s Day (and every day!), I’m so proud to have a daughter like Yassamin. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107509462/544904086/-1074210638?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjM3MDYxNS04MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbU2mgfEtNOiUWfSQuCNcGAgGcCWQasXGzItI_osKL8=) I see a lot of the work behind the scenes that you don’t get a chance to see, and when I say she’s working overtime for Arizonans across the 3rd District, I mean it! We have a standing ritual — any Thursday that she flies back home from Washington, DC, at 8 pm, her dad and I pick her up from the airport and get Persian food together. It’s practically the only time we get to see her because she spends Friday and the weekend hosting town halls and engaging with constituents in her district. There have been tens of thousands of doors knocked, countless late nights, and even some tears, because running a successful campaign can be stressful! But she’s handled it with grace every step of the way because she cares just that deeply about Arizonans and public service. **_**[If you’re as proud of her work as I am, Peter, would you consider making a contribution to support her campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107509463/544904091/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjM3MDYxNS04MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbU2mgfEtNOiUWfSQuCNcGAgGcCWQasXGzItI_osKL8=)**_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107509465/544904093/1386253589?express=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjM3MDYxNS04MzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbU2mgfEtNOiUWfSQuCNcGAgGcCWQasXGzItI_osKL8=)

We’re pushing City Council for more home repair funding and a budget that demands that landlords hold up their end of the bargain. This is a big opportunity to advance renter- and homeowner-led demands to maintain and repair hundreds of homes in our communities from leaks to mold and more.
On May 13, the community is coming together for the next big stage of the Safe and Healthy Homes campaign to testify at the City Budget Public Input Hearing. We need advocates like you with us — your story and your experience is what will make the City Council act urgently, addressing our issues like the crisis it is. [RSVP today for more details and get connected with our housing justice organizers!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107509492/544904213/590149826?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250510_rsvp_RUPhearing_team_oc_geo_xx_l1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250510_rsvp_RUPhearing_team_oc_geo_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzNDcxM2I3LTgzMmUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o4FAS5WgjG_y0jqi8NnV-AqCSbCbGkRga5k5woVHIO4=&emci=1831a901-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b34713b7-832e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669)
[Sign me up](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107509493/544904214/590149826?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250510_rsvp_RUPhearing_team_oc_geo_xx_sbt2&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250510_rsvp_RUPhearing_team_oc_geo_xx_sbt2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzNDcxM2I3LTgzMmUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o4FAS5WgjG_y0jqi8NnV-AqCSbCbGkRga5k5woVHIO4=&emci=1831a901-102d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=b34713b7-832e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669)

clean_body: Our next big activation for housing rights is taking place this Tuesday — join us at City Hall! | = Our next big activation for housing rights is taking place this Tuesday — join us at City Hall! | We’re pushing City Council for more home repair funding and a budget that demands that landlords hold up their end of the bargain. This is a big opportunity to advance renter- and homeowner-led demands to maintain and repair hundreds of homes in our communities from leaks to mold and more. On May 13, the community is coming together for the next big stage of the Safe and Healthy Homes campaign to testify at the City Budget Public Input Hearing. We need advocates like you with us — your story and your experience is what will make the City Council act urgently, addressing our issues like the crisis it is. — One PA Renters United P.S. Can’t make it in-person? Follow the campaign on social media for live updates: @ruprenters = | One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system. | = h = | | Paid for by One Pennsylvania One PA 533 S 52nd St Philadelphia, PA 19143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Peter, it’s Valerie –

**Happy Mother’s Day! ❤️** **As a wife, mother, and proud grandmother** — who welcomed her second grandchild just a few weeks ago — Mother’s Day holds a dear place in my heart.

It’s a day that reminds me not only of the women who raised us with love and strength, but also the responsibility we have to support mothers in real, lasting ways.

One of my greatest accomplishments in life has been raising my two sons to be loving, compassionate, and responsible men. I know firsthand the joys and challenges that motherhood brings and the importance of making sure every parent has the resources they need to give their children the life they deserve.

That’s why I’m committed to fighting for the things that matter to all the moms and families: affordable health care, access to IVF and reproductive care, quality public education, expansive childcare, and lower everyday costs.

**So today, I’m sending love to all who mother — with gratitude and a commitment to building a country that respects and supports them.**

Wishing you a joyful Mother’s Day,

Valerie Foushee

name: Deb Haaland
subject: This Mother’s Day, I’m carrying my mom’s strength with me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
My mom taught me to never look away when people are hurting.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1878%2E400544%2EjUrhDd)
This Mother’s Day, I’m thinking about my mom — and the fight she passed down to me.
My mom, Mary Toya, was born and raised in a boxcar, where the Laguna people created a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted 25 years to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs. She played the snare drum in the Santa Fe Indian Band.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250511_1_mothersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250511-1878&refcode2=1878_400544_jUrhDd&akid=1878%2E400544%2EjUrhDd)
My mom was proud, practical, and fierce. She taught me that strength is about showing up — even when it’s hard. It’s about doing what’s right, not what’s easy. And it’s about never backing down from a fight that matters.
**That’s the governor I will be.**
Right now, Donald Trump and his billionaire allies are gutting public education, slashing food assistance, and threatening programs that helped me survive as a young single mom — and continue to be a lifeline for so many New Mexicans right now.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250511_1_mothersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250511-1878&refcode2=1878_400544_jUrhDd&akid=1878%2E400544%2EjUrhDd)
Governors are the first line of defense against the new Trump administration, and I promise to fight fiercely to defend the families who are doing everything they can to stay afloat, just like mine once did.
**I’ll fight because I know what it’s like to struggle, and because my mom taught me to never look away when people are hurting.**
This Mother’s Day, I’m carrying her strength with me. I’m standing in the values she passed down — values rooted in love, service, and fierce determination. And I’m using every ounce of that strength to build something better for New Mexicans.
**[If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 to support our grassroots campaign? Together, we’ll build a future that honors the care and sacrifice of New Mexico’s mothers.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250511_1_mothersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250511-1878&refcode2=1878_400544_jUrhDd&akid=1878%2E400544%2EjUrhDd)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250511_1_mothersday?amount=5&refcode=em20250511-1878&refcode2=1878_400544_jUrhDd&akid=1878%2E400544%2EjUrhDd)**
Be fierce and Happy Mother’s Day,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250511-1&t=2&refcode2=1878_400544_jUrhDd&akid=1878%2E400544%2EjUrhDd)**
* * *

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: The greatest gift in the world
body:
Motherhood.

| | **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107510714/544908503/2128941220?&refcode=E13247-20250511-MothersDay-Image-Holiday&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2ZTE0M2E4LTg4MmUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=w00FTunMevz1jRXTWdvos-hF0_T4zZx-glWAEo-RWQg=)** Peter, You all call me Congresswoman — but to my little boy, I’m just _Mama_. And let me tell you, that’s the greatest gift in the world. Like so many moms out there, I know what it’s like to juggle motherhood, a full-time job, and a million other responsibilities. It’s not always easy, but we show up, get it done, and then do it all over again the next day. That lived experience is something I carry with me every day in Congress. It’s what drives my work in Congress to build a future where families can thrive, parents are supported, and every child has the opportunities to succeed. Today, I want to say happy Mother’s Day to all the incredible moms out there. \- Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
---

name: Katie Porter
subject: Politics & my kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
They’ve given some of the best political speeches I’ve ever seen
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39712%2E3422442%2EY8evap)
Dear Derek,
Part of being a mom is worrying about your kids, and with everything we’re seeing from Donald Trump and the attacks on our democracy and our rights, many parents have asked me how to navigate.
I first ran for office in 2018 because I couldn’t sit on the sidelines while Trump attacked families like mine. I had never run for office before, and I knew running in a district where the Republican incumbent had won by double digits just a few years back meant it would be time consuming and challenging.
Because my kids were young, and because I’m a single mom, I had to involve my kids, explaining why I was running and what it would demand. They were part of my campaign life—because they are the most important thing in my life. **Each child gave my introduction speech on election night over the years, and while they may bicker about who did the best job, I think these are the best political speeches ever given.** And they’re among my most treasured memories.
**This Mother’s Day I wanted to share some highlights with you,[you can watch here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250511_1_ak?refcode=em20250511-39712&refcode2=39712_3422442_Y8evap&akid=39712%2E3422442%2EY8evap)**
It’s true, my kids have had to grapple with politics and policy, and a mom who had to juggle both. But that experience has helped make them the amazing young people they are. That gives my Mother’s Day an extra special meaning.
Katie Porter
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250511_1_ak?refcode=em20250511-39712&refcode2=39712_3422442_Y8evap&akid=39712%2E3422442%2EY8evap)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250511-39712&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39712_3422442_Y8evap&akid=39712%2E3422442%2EY8evap)**

name: New Dems
subject: Clooney predicts a Democratic House in 2026!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund

subject: read this if you’re wondering how you can help fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Here’s the good news: There’s so much you can do to stand with us and fight back. Because the fact is, if we don’t fight, we won’t win.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107511761/544912127/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTllZTczNS04YTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxyYZf5a-YpeXtSWRJsxyIu6XENb1PLh9drZbSFCedo=) Andrea Salinas is working around the clock to bring down the cost of living, defend our democratic values, and push back against the extreme Trump-Musk agenda. You might be wondering what you can do to help. Here’s the good news: _There’s so much you can do to stand with us and fight back._ **Because the fact is, if we don’t fight, we won’t win.** You can volunteer for an organization on the front-lines of protecting the vulnerable Americans Trump is targeting with his attacks. You can attend a virtual or in-person town hall to share your story, ask tough questions, and hold your representatives accountable. _And if you’re in OR-06, keep an eye out for Andrea’s next event!_ And you can fight back directly by donating your time or money to campaigns and organizations working to stop Trump and defend vulnerable communities. **[If you’re with us, you can chip in here to keep Andrea Salinas in the fight as she battles extreme Republican legislation in the House._Anything you can afford to give will make a big difference._ →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107511762/544912128/1012014768?refcode=email_051125_help&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTllZTczNS04YTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxyYZf5a-YpeXtSWRJsxyIu6XENb1PLh9drZbSFCedo=)** | | **[CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107511763/544912129/1012014768?refcode=email_051125_help&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTllZTczNS04YTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxyYZf5a-YpeXtSWRJsxyIu6XENb1PLh9drZbSFCedo=)**

You can attend a virtual or in-person town hall to share your story, ask tough questions, and hold your representatives accountable. And if you’re in OR-06, keep an eye out for Andrea’s next event! And you can fight back directly by donating your time or money to campaigns and organizations working to stop Trump and defend vulnerable communities. = | | = However you contribute, thank you for doing your part. \- Salinas HQ | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Mike Thompson
subject: Celebrating Mother’s
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Today is a day that we recognize some of the most important people in our lives. Mothers are often those who raised us, molded us into the people we are today, and taught us how to take on the world.

Mothers put the needs of their kids before anyone else, and they fight for their values to be heard by going to rallies and speaking up every day. That’s why they deserve a government that will put their needs first. Today, and every day, I am focused on being a strong advocate for mothers and delivering meaningful change to improve their lives.

Today, let’s come together to celebrate all mothers and show appreciation for the remarkable women who enrich our lives. From my family to yours, wishing you a peaceful and love-filled Mother’s Day.

Thanks,

Mike

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A National Medal of Motherhood?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
"We are not going to lose this house,” she kept saying.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2542%2E4032634%2EHSMnY-)
---
I hope you’re having a good Mother’s Day, and if this holiday hits you hard, my heart goes out to you. I’m thinking about my mother today, and I’m thinking about a time when she dug deep to take care of our family. After my daddy had a heart attack, he couldn’t work for a while. Bills piled up. We lost our family station wagon. It looked like the house would be next to go. At night, I’d overhear my parents talk, and that's when I learned words like “mortgage” and “foreclosure.” One day, I walked into my parents’ bedroom. My mother’s face was red and puffy. A dress was laid out over the bedspread — the dress that only came out for weddings, graduations, and funerals. "We are not going to lose this house,” she kept saying. “We are not going to lose this house.” She’d never worked outside the home. She was terrified. But she knew what she had to do. I watched her while she pulled it together, put that dress on, put on her high heels, blew her nose, walked to Sears, and got a minimum wage job. And that minimum wage job saved our house, but more importantly, it saved our family. This is a story that’s written on my heart. I’m remembering my mother’s courage this Mother’s Day — and I’m thinking about all the mamas out there fighting for their families. I’m also thinking about all the ways the deck has been stacked against mothers and families like ours today. When this happened to my family, the minimum wage in America would support a family of three. It would take care of a mortgage, utilities, and put food on the table. But today, a full-time minimum wage job will not keep a family out of poverty. A full-time minimum wage earner today still can’t afford a two-bedroom apartment in any state in the country — let alone a house. And on top of skytrocketing housing prices, families have to manage rising costs on basic necessities like health care and child care — with parents saying they’re spending 22% of their household income on child care. Not to mention, Trump is doing his best to make life even harder for families right now with his dumb tariffs that can drive up costs while also risking putting people out of work. This year’s Mother’s Day is also arriving on the heels of a recent New York Times report about how the Trump administration is soliciting ideas on how to persuade women to have more children. They want to create a "National Medal of Motherhood" for mothers with six or more children. Look, mothers today do not need a medal. I’m sure that’d be nice, but what about universal child care? Paid leave? Policies that make it easier for families to make ends meet — from raising the minimum wage to lowering the cost of housing by building more supply? Today, and every day, I’m going to keep fighting for our government to actually pass policies that help mothers and families, not just dangle around shallow incentives. To honor my mother and mothers everywhere. Thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement to make real change. Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Baby tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Folks,
As if it wasn’t already stressful enough being a new parent, Trump’s ridiculous trade war is making life more difficult and more expensive for new families.
Let’s call these tariffs what they are: a baby tax . Car seats. Baby strollers. High chairs. Cribs. The cost of everything new parents need in the first weeks and months of their baby’s life is through the roof right now for no reason at all. ( Happy Mother’s Day, right? )
I’m a proud aunt — plus I’m 36 so pretty much all my friends have babies right now! — so I hear a lot about navigating sleepless nights, doctor visits, finding child care, and the constant worry about doing everything right. That’s already a lot. And now families are being forced to pay hundreds or thousands more for the tools they need to keep their kids safe.
Take car seats. Experts recommend only using new seats, and new parents and their baby can’t even be discharged from the hospital without having their seat installed and ready to go. So an increase in the cost of car seats means a definitive increase in the cost of parenthood — because no one is trying to cut corners when the safety of your child is the top priority!
Look, Donald Trump and the GOP can talk all they want about how they’re ‘pro-family’, but it’s 100% clear to anyone paying attention that they’re just not.
If the self-described ‘fertilization president’ (sorry for the reminder 🥴) actually gave a damn about American families, he would not be waging a pointless trade war that’s sending prices skyrocketing!
Right now, Trump and the GOP are floating tiny, one-time “baby bonuses” to persuade women to have more babies — while also weaponizing trade policies that drain family budgets and trying to take away their health care.
To state the obvious: Caring about families doesn’t mean doing everything possible to make life objectively harder for families. Increasing food costs, cutting essential services and benefits, targeting trans and autistic kids, questioning vaccine science... come on.
What’s pro-family? Fighting for universal child care, paid leave, and health care that doesn’t bankrupt you.
If you’re as fired up as I am about this economic assault on American families, sign my petition to demand that Republicans drop this ridiculous baby tax. Together we can fight for policies that actually help families thrive. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/enjP0CeJh0mn1N2mmHifKg2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/enjP0CeJh0mn1N2mmHifKg2]
Thanks for standing up for families with me. And happy Mother’s Day to all the moms and mother figures out there!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107512344/544914537/-629675555?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyZGJiYjItOGQyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SlVQNjyMrLzawkhOdvY_mItIjhg78gFF6bGzc07_GXM=) Friend,

I wanted to reach out, personally, to share my story – what inspired me to run for Congress in 2024 and why I’m running for re-election in 2026. **If you don’t have time to read the rest of my note (and that’s okay!),[can I count on you to pitch in a few dollars to our grassroots campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107512345/544914538/-629675555?refcode=email_051125_fight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyZGJiYjItOGQyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SlVQNjyMrLzawkhOdvY_mItIjhg78gFF6bGzc07_GXM=)** | | [PITCH IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107512346/544914539/-629675555?refcode=email_051125_fight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyZGJiYjItOGQyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SlVQNjyMrLzawkhOdvY_mItIjhg78gFF6bGzc07_GXM=)
---
I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers. When I was a child, my interest in engineering led to a college scholarship to study electrical engineering. After working for General Motors, I transitioned to running a small business with my husband, Mark, operating four restaurants in our community.

It was actually my mom that first inspired me to run for office. I’ll never forget the conversation we had when she said, **"If your generation doesn't stand up and fight, we stand to lose the progress my generation worked for."**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107512347/544914540/-629675555?refcode=email_051125_fight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyZGJiYjItOGQyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SlVQNjyMrLzawkhOdvY_mItIjhg78gFF6bGzc07_GXM=)**
**Today in Congress, that’s exactly what I’m doing – standing up and fighting for progress.** And with Donald Trump and Elon Musk undermining our nation’s very foundation every day, it’s clear our fight is far from over.

That’s why I’m running for re-election and I want you by my side. **[Will you make a donation to my 2026 campaign today to help me fight for a better world, expand opportunity for all, and ensure Democrats can take back the House Majority from MAGA Republicans next year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107512348/544914541/-629675555?refcode=email_051125_fight&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkyZGJiYjItOGQyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SlVQNjyMrLzawkhOdvY_mItIjhg78gFF6bGzc07_GXM=)**

clean_body: = Friend, I wanted to reach out, personally, to share my story – what inspired me to run for Congress in 2024 and why I’m running for re-election in 2026. If you don’t have time to read the rest of my note (and that’s okay!),= | | = I grew up in a working-class family as the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers. When I was a child, my interest in engineering led to a college scholarship to study electrical engineering. After working for General Motors, I transitioned to running a small business with my husband, Mark, operating four restaurants in our community. It was actually my mom that first inspired me to run for office. I’ll never forget the conversation we had when she said, "If your generation doesn't stand up and fight, we stand to lose the progress my generation worked for." = Today in Congress, that’s exactly what I’m doing – standing up and fighting for progress. And with Donald Trump and Elon Musk undermining our nation’s very foundation every day, it’s clear our fight is far from over. That’s why I’m running for re-election and I want you by my side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Trump said “I don’t know” to upholding the Constitution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Not a single Republican senator spoke up.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250511-1&t=1&akid=2114%2E587540%2EPBKFCN)
Peter, when Trump was asked if it's his duty as president to uphold the Constitution, he said: **_"I don't know."_**
Not “Yes, but...” or “Of course, however...” – just _“I don’t know.”_
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250511_1_trump_constitution?refcode=em20250511-2114&amount=5&refcode2=2114_587540_PBKFCN&akid=2114%2E587540%2EPBKFCN)
Let’s be clear: if Barack Obama or Joe Biden ever said that, the GOP would be calling for their impeachment within the hour. But Trump says it? **And every single Republican senator stays silent.**
🚨 The president just shrugged at the Constitution.
🚨 MAGA Republicans said nothing.
🚨 And voters see a party too afraid to fight back.
This is about more than one outrageous moment – it’s about a political system that’s lost the trust of an entire generation.
That’s why we built **Leaders We Deserve:** to replace the corrupt and cowardly with young, bold leaders who will fight for democracy and mean it.
We don’t take corporate PAC money. We’re funded by the grassroots – people like you – and every dollar helps us challenge the old guard and build something better. **[So if you’re fired up like we are, here’s the best way to respond: Make a $5 contribution right now and show Trump that grassroots donors aren't going anywhere.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250511_1_trump_constitution?refcode=em20250511-2114&amount=5&refcode2=2114_587540_PBKFCN&akid=2114%2E587540%2EPBKFCN)**

Let’s stop waiting for the people in power to do the right thing. Let’s replace them.
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A card for Eve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8568%2E5257348%2ERQg1F7)
Hi Derek,
I wanted to take a moment this morning to wish a happy Mother’s Day to all the moms who provide for and nurture our families.
**I especially want to celebrate my wife, Eve, an incredible mother to our children, Lexi and Eli, and someone who has supported and taken such good care of our family.**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202505-mothersday.1btyDK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8568%2E5257348%2ERQg1F7)
It’s no exaggeration to say that I would not have made it to the Senate without Eve’s support. She’s been my rock through good times and bad, and my kids and I agree that she’s the best mom in the world.
**[So Derek, to make Eve’s day extra special this year, I’m hoping you will sign the Mother’s Day card I’ve prepared for her. She means so much to me and to our family. Please take a moment to add your name and a short note if you’d like, today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202505-mothersday.1btyDK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8568%2E5257348%2ERQg1F7)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202505-mothersday.1btyDK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8568%2E5257348%2ERQg1F7)
---
I’m wishing a happy Mother’s Day to the amazing moms out there. I hope you have a joyful, restful day.
— Adam

clean_body: | Hi Derek, I wanted to take a moment this morning to wish a happy Mother’s Day to all the moms who provide for and nurture our families. I especially want to celebrate my wife, Eve, an incredible mother to our children, Lexi and Eli, and someone who has supported and taken such good care of our family. It’s no exaggeration to say that I would not have made it to the Senate without Eve’s support. She’s been my rock through good times and bad, and my kids and I agree that she’s the best mom in the world. I’m wishing a happy Mother’s Day to the amazing moms out there. I hope you have a joyful, restful day. — Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . name: Wes Moore
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=41%2E1086043%2EIurXQg ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=41%2E1086043%2EIurXQg ]Wes Moore for Governor

619.

I keep a
clock on my desk that tells me how many days I have left in my term in
office.

It reminds me: do not waste a day. I was elected by the people and I need
to do everything I can to help
you.

There are 619 days left until my first term is up. So I’m being
intentional about how I make change.

That means doing things like raising the minimum wage in Maryland. Gone
should be the days when you have people who are working jobs — or multiple
jobs — and still live at or below the poverty line.

That means making truly historic investments in childcare. Because no
parent should have to decide between whether their kid will be okay, or if
they can go back to the workforce.

Look, my
reelection campaign is about the same thing as my first election: you.
When I first ran for governor, I was up against the political
establishment. But I had something different — the people.

We’re building a movement that will win this decade and help future
Marylanders thrive. That’s the only way we’ll continue this important
work.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250511-1?refcode=em-20250511-1&refcode2=41_1086043_IurXQg&akid=41%2E1086043%2EIurXQg ]None of this would be possible without the support of people like you.
Please, to help us win reelection, will you chip in today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250511-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250511-1&refcode2=41_1086043_IurXQg&akid=41%2E1086043%2EIurXQg ]Donate $5 ››

| Dear Friend,
Tracy and I hope all the incredible moms out there had a day filled with love, relaxation, and all the joy you bring to others. Whether you're a mom, stepmom, grandmother, or mother figure--thank you for your love, your strength, and your endless patience. Today is for you. Happy Mother's Day!
"She will give birth to a son, and you are to give him the name Jesus, because he will save his people from their sins." -- Matthew 1:21

I grew up in a working class family, so I know _exactly_ how far a few dollars can go in your pocket.

But there’s a reason I need to ask you, Peter.

**I don’t do a second of call time.**

Instead of spending hours on the phone begging for money, I spend my time doing exactly what I came to Congress for: _Fighting to create a better country._

But I’m only able to do that with support from dedicated grassroots supporters like you, Peter.

[With a few days until our mid-quarter deadline, I really need to ask for your help: Can you give just $3 to fuel this people-powered movement? subject: 💥 Don't Miss This FREE Event!
body:
Get ready for a special evening! | | |

|

|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=7fb662001a&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# MARCELL STRBICH FOR OHIO SECRETARY OF STATE!

OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN KICKOFF!

YOU'RE INVITED TO THIS EXCITING, FREE, EVENT!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c56de5e40b&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| **MARCELL STRBICH OFFICIAL CAMPAIGN KICKOFF EVENT!
MAY 21, 2024 at 7:00 PM • MEDINA, OHIO**
We have a grassroots, patriot, combat veteran who has stepped up to selflessly run for Ohio Secretary of State in 2026, Marcell Strbich. Many of you know Marcell. You've heard him on the radio with Bob Frantz, Jack Windsor, and Brian Thomas. You've seen him on video with Emerald Robinson and Steve Stern. You've seen him testify at the State Capital on election integrity legislation. He can and will do the job to secure Ohio's elections and clean up Ohio's registered voter rolls, which contrary to what you hear from our current Secretary of State, are a MESS. Many of you know Marcell and personally endorse him. For those of you who don't, once you get to know him we're confident he'll have your endorsement too!
**Marcell is officially kicking off his campaign the evening of May 21st in Medina. It's a FREE event and all are welcome! Come meet Marcell, ask him questions, and get answers!**
**To learn more about Marcell Strbich, go[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e1445be6d2&e=5c740fa3e2) or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ea422b9f37&e=5c740fa3e2)**
**Here's a video of what we all need to do. HINT: It's titled "DONATE • DONATE • DONATE!" and you can do it[ HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dc72ed0e3d&e=5c740fa3e2).**
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=74a4288d2e&e=5c740fa3e2 "Donate • Donate • Donate! Marcell Strbich for Ohio Secretary of State!")
---
DONATE • DONATE • DONATE! MARCELL STRBICH FOR OHIO SoS
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# FREE TRAINING FOR SCHOOL BOARD CANDIDATES!
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c5f5bdbdb1&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| **CANDIDATE TRAINING ALERT: HOW TO RUN FOR YOUR SCHOOL BOARD
WEDNESDAY MAY 14th at 7:00 PM by ZOOM!
JOIN IN YOUR SWEATPANTS!**
---
| Our good friends at **OSBCC** , the **Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition** , are holding a **FREE training session for school board candidates** next week! They asked us to help them get the word out. **PLEASE SHARE THIS WITH ANYONE & EVERYONE YOU KNOW WHO IS RUNNING OR MIGHT BE CONSIDERING RUNNING FOR SCHOOL BOARD.**

"Thinking about running for school board? Ohio School Board Constitutional Coalition ([OSBCC.org](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=82da79f6c7&e=5c740fa3e2)) can help you run your best campaign possible! During the 2023 election cycle, **about 40% of the candidates OSBCC worked with were elected** , and they think they can help even more in 2025!

**The first training session is on Wednesday, May 14 at 7 PM via Zoom.** To get the training link and other details, **become a member of OSBCC (FREE)** by going to [https://osbcc.org/membership-application/](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e53b98d260&e=5c740fa3e2) and fill out your contact information and sign the OSBCC pledge. An email will be sent out with all the training details. **Running for school board is critical to America's future, and there have never been more resources to help you get elected!"**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | **GFI NEWSLETTER ARCHIVE**
---
|
[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=364c88e348&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e3267e366b&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=fa5264befd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=fa5264befd).

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Our resistance is working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
His numbers are falling and that’s no accident. Let’s keep going.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250511-5035-footer&t=1&akid=5035%2E420207%2ERTdjkN)
Peter, Donald Trump’s approval is sinking, and it’s not hard to see why.
The American people are watching him terrorize immigrant communities, threaten economic stability with haphazard tariffs, and empower extremist allies — and the people are rejecting it.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250511?refcode=em20250511-5035&amount=3&refcode2=5035_420207_RTdjkN&akid=5035%2E420207%2ERTdjkN)
Let’s be clear: this isn’t just luck. **This is the result of organized resistance** — people speaking out, showing up, and fighting back every single day. And we can’t let up now.
Pramila’s on the front lines fighting for immigration justice, Medicare For All, a ban on congressional stock trading, and an end to the Trump administration’s blatant corruption – whether it’s insider trading around tariff announcements or the billionaire tax breaks his allies keep pushing.
**But if we want to keep this momentum going, we need to show that our movement is strong and growing — and we need your help to do it.**
**[Will you chip in $3 right now to help us keep organizing, keep resisting, and keep building a government that puts people over profits?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250511?refcode=em20250511-5035&amount=3&refcode2=5035_420207_RTdjkN&akid=5035%2E420207%2ERTdjkN)
**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250511?amount=3&refcode=em20250511-5035&refcode2=5035_420207_RTdjkN&akid=5035%2E420207%2ERTdjkN)**
Trump’s approval may be slipping, but he still poses a serious threat to our democracy — and the only way we stop him is together.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250511-5035-footer&t=2&refcode2=5035_420207_RTdjkN&akid=5035%2E420207%2ERTdjkN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter,

This Mother’s Day, we’re celebrating all the incredible moms— _**especially our very own Dr. Kim Schrier!**_

Moms take on many forms, but no matter what, they are individuals who nurture the next generation of leaders. They are the pillars of our communities and strengthen the backbone of our families, from the paid to the unpaid labor— _they do it all._

Kim fights tirelessly every single day to ensure Washington families have access to better healthcare, and a brighter future for the next generation, while also going above and beyond for her own family. [**Today, we hope you'll join us in wishing Kim a Happy Mother’s Day! clean_body: This Mother’s Day, we’re celebrating all the incredible moms—including our very own Dr. Kim Schrier! Peter, This Mother’s Day, we’re celebrating all the incredible moms— especially our very own Dr. Kim Schrier! Moms take on many forms, but no matter what, they are individuals who nurture the next generation of leaders. They are the pillars of our communities and strengthen the backbone of our families, from the paid to the unpaid labor— they do it all. Kim fights tirelessly every single day to ensure Washington families have access to better healthcare, and a brighter future for the next generation, while also going above and beyond for her own family. Thanks for being part of this team 💙 —Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. clean_body: Be honest: Were my first 100 days a success? | | | | I know it’s Mother’s Day, BUT can I have at least a few seconds of your undivided attention? PLEASE, it’s your President! Sorry to bother, but I’ve been trying to contact you for WEEKS. Maybe I had the wrong email address? Thank goodness I found you because my is due tonight, and I need your unfiltered thoughts. BE HONEST! Don’t hold back. I don’t want anybody else’s opinion except for True MAGA Patriots. I only want Friend’s. Sincerely, Donald J. name: Wesley Bell
subject: My mom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
_This email is about Mother’s Day, we know motherhood and all the associated feelings, emotions and memories can be tricky – and even triggering for some people. We understand if you want to skip reading this one._ Peter, Happy Mother’s Day to every mom (and mother figure) across the country, but especially to the woman who changed my life – my own mom.

Growing up, my mom was (and still is) my hero. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107515123/544924270/552493051?refcode=em25_250511_momday_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250511_momday_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f806dc6b-992e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjgwNmRjNmItOTkyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mtKjtqXTlydgTc2YY4rVa0aiSgOToQsS_6M7_yHL0iM=)
---

My mom was there for everything – every school milestone, every childhood sporting event – and she is the reason I knew I could go on to accomplish anything I set my mind to.

Today, I hope you’ll join me in wishing moms across the country a Happy Mother’s Day.

Thank you,

Wesley

## White House Announces Trade Deal With China – RedState
It turns out that Secretary Treasury Scott Bessent was more than hinting at being close to striking a deal with China during trade talks in Switzerland, as my colleague Bob Hoge reported. The White House sent out a press release Sunday afternoon announcing a "China Trade Deal in Geneva." [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/CLYcPi0Y8eNNy2-OoDa8TQf2kOWvqznQ5vZLL6Hl30b5Elt3qdSdrANhEHlsFRDEVzhA_HTJcBwnz7Te-ad-iXcdMXHgtaRYVo81xNSle_ObzlTIJ2OxX6hSJl49jdNS40sonUpr8w1sQ3cdg1B2abiuGjl3IwIbaiiYDVrksXXG1Ns1-DTKU0wIHQiisd-RH_DXCVd9cJMZxXnnGQEwFuhNFJl156In2uXt_vrJBc7tIzFCd051mx5_NmuiV16J4xw4Ye6kpIxVU1C2NyXQmjyKRJjnIEHzCS22F-xakNPuQsqtYY6kVp7VnR6mfOnBrcM-KVTQO1nql57-sa72kA/9yeNjqyvLhCoblMMFH4K3bQDdrB5CChQ/8)

## Insurrection In Massachusetts | Power Line
Bill Glahn has been chronicling the insurrection that took place in Newark on Friday. A similar, if smaller-scale, insurrection occurred in Worcester, Massachusetts on the same day. In the Worcester rebellion, a mob of around 25 people tried to impede ICE and local authorities, who were arresting an illegal alien wanted for assault and battery [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/WShMvIFklGHx0EuoFu29acQTA5OEpRtvhY6hIsoQl21qQavNW36dfssl13pqltyYMdXKkwluBTI-fZLHmQ4muGuxRIanasXoJ4ZxVTt7jt4eMvPPywPuO1xJDWFApZawQzLkj57TD5dbCFXBxNek3fE1QLXjgMV8fl6KfrLzxw57fOXQMhkuU2vzRRel-ZiirEqZQscq1U4xOnbzxHUQZzz3hA7J8SoCDSCykZ7SPiPACLL-GBoWCrbUVMNJWanBKRx0_RZSFI97D_J_KCgUdrcaydQZES0tqrqII4yOfYevL3K3JEFqtDSSVRZO5zRWCTxOfQ/Ioiq2BBm6unSeUeFeHUbggiasc_O6uOV/8)

## United States ‘signs accord with Beijing’ after Donald Trump declares ‘national emergency’
The United States and China have signed a "trade deal" after a more than month-long trade war between the world's two largest economies, the White House has said. The pair had been negotiating in Geneva, Switzerland, for two days - and on Sunday afternoon, a statement from Donald Trump's office said that a "deal" had [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/5Obd1DWPtyZ7p_G38spMuPvDbYGu1sw5Yxvn1fWqK5alpdgiLGzx04OqmIz3DCAKyrke82GpOPqP5AJU-GktzzdPefyFnBkMt5hoGpvSVglJx68tajFArBVu65QmdU6k7qNCTg01xAG6uv8zk02Y259imxz4D6SLWyROHW8uDx_BXx3FqEKwt-vwI29xRkv8SiWcpixlsW5sdhhj0eIXrjxNklNf70aw2NG0igDE-7QiHmaP6iqq6-z2Dk6s9o-nJXdDJf_-NtK4pEryufRJDAEONTqFInjP6pbmWbMg60lQhtAWZGWOwHmYoTfOqNNafffVNfjvL4yaTOtI2jDTZgcA599igCZ5RxWCoNXO_KNuNXrzs-9kXRpzORltbdB_VCg/6vM3WSmLRR4_tEOeO5IwkrflNunhgur-/8)

## Zelensky names where and when he’ll meet Putin in new ceasefire update | World | News
Volodymyr Zelensky has said he will be "waiting for Putin in Türkiye on Thursday" as crunch talks on a ceasefire in Russia-Ukraine war loom. The Ukrainian President wrote on X at 6.01pm BST: "We await a full and lasting ceasefire, starting from tomorrow, to provide the necessary basis for diplomacy. There is no point in [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/U8vS1LTpLyJbmO2Fme5EbIgPXnVvX8yAWSoGkMhP-K1HxK5S0kyITMPsMYhYDg06TeP5xa25M3KtlRq_Jbm3V2ir-6XtFd8ammt10cUGLPIlznD62QHxBRjSyL5zfIxhPlzQ5sknU2noCjWQEJviMqb4HK4yNdjzHdL1EGHj9NvHi2TSfcjs59U2pfqdJ03LlXNKrgQyLW_ANnkEmt1u6xObxfTK1JNMUoAZu7rz-e20jdSgnRuY2LOMlx9iO0Wn9i_Hgfh7sDIfwx5nre7s7XAcFN29eufchbf666dO4m2l7qo8mlkbqrCdsqBI6qg7W4q1xgPyVK9Xu3MemlaEv3Ks5x-yvBHku7xHrwgXY6JYqFuDkfew8nvAqJE/agEQvYcuB5L3KIDTnZh3hvIONeJjhPff/8)

## Volodymyr Zelensky confirms he will personally attend peace talks in major ultimatum to Putin -‘I will be waiting!’
Volodymyr Zelensky has confirmed he will personally attend landmark peace talks on Thursday with Russia in a direct ultimatum to Vladimir Putin. Writing on social media on Sunday afternoon, Ukraine's President said he "will be waiting" in Istanbul for his Russian counterpart to sit down and negotiate. * * *
Peter, Donald Trump has made his intentions clear: He doesn’t think the Constitution applies to him — and he’s not afraid to say it out loud.
In a recent CNN interview, Trump was asked if he’d uphold the Constitution. His answer? **“I don’t know.”**
He’s already defying court rulings, attacking prosecutors, and his administration has boasted that if the Supreme Court rules against him, they could be arrested.
In a post on X, **he even claimed to have absolute power to break the law to “save the Country.”**
Let us be clear: **This is how dictatorships begin.**
That’s why top Democrats are considering bringing Articles of Impeachment against Donald J. Trump — but we want to know what you think.
[So we’re circulating an urgent poll to assess Georgians’ opinions. Will you complete our 60-second poll before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107515855/544926797/2094483542?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_051125_1000RESPONSE_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWI0MTVkZC05ZDJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jl_6IVHhn8pg0sT2JbufqhjqIuOWIzb9t93bOisq-sw=&emci=8db415dd-9d2e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=95b415dd-9d2e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=43566853)

name: JD Vance
subject: I thank God every day for this victory
body:
We needed it.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asta/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend - this is Vice President JD Vance.
**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asta/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, friend.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asta/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asta/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.
[CHIP IN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asta/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Freedom,_
**Vice President JD Vance**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/asta/?__vbtrk=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg5NjkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | |

|

---

|

name: Forward Party
subject: Control What You Can - How Can We Help Career Readiness?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Make your voice heard.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=1)
---
| Peter -- We're on to the newest installment of _**Control What You Can.**_ A lot has been written about the readiness of the next generations for the workforce. The student loan crisis is heavily covered, but there's also discussion of the availability of entry-level positions. The trades and apprenticeships are receiving focus, as well. The jobs of the future seem to always change, and the recommendation to focus on skills such as problem solving and communication is usually mixed with a note that we have failed to properly train future workers with these skillsets. [How is the US Doing Preparing the Next Generations for the Workforce?](https://home.forwardparty.com/workforce_policy_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=2) Building a resilient and representative economy requires creating opportunities and providing the education and training for individuals to take advantage of those opportunities. How is the US doing in these areas, and on which area should we be focused? Weight in across our platforms this weekend! Answer on our website: [](https://home.forwardparty.com/workforce_policy_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=3) Or on X: [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=mhUdGCm_eEqxEEjcw0-lGbIN6AZpbu4iFxE-qCh2CjEzKDWIbPDxHCqiCf-95a7tbpVXxmUMjV1vE5a1VsCWrw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=4) Once you've answered the poll, please leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. Join the conversation! Looking forward to hearing from you, The Forward Party Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=5)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=6)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=7)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=8)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=9)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=10)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=11)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=12)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=for_matt_5_10_email_saturday_c&n=13)

Answer on our website: Or on X: Once you've answered the poll, please leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. Join the conversation! Looking forward to hearing from you, The Forward Party Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L) **BREAKING: Trump Planning $100 Million Military Parade for 79th Birthday** [**Do you approve of Trump 's military parade?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=3&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=4&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)

[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=7&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)
---
**_This poll is registered for you only. Please respond by 11:59 PM, 5/11/2025._**
We wish this was just a nightmare.

**But this is reality.** Trump wants to celebrate his birthday by planning an embarrassingly lavish military parade.

_It 's something that would happen in North Korea?!?_

Ever since he returned to the White House, Trump has worked to cut funding from essential programs like Social Security, Medicaid, and public education. **The hypocrisy is staggering that Trump now wants to spend MILLIONS on a military parade.**

We're infuriated. Before we take action we want to see if Democrats across the country agree with us.

[**_Please represent Democrats in your state and take this urgent poll before midnight tonight >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=8&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)
[**Do you approve of Trump 's military parade?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=9&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)
| | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=10&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=11&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61132?t=12&akid=23055%2E4449941%2Enuvq5L)

- Fight for Reform

**By Rudy Giuliani**
The Western world, the cradle of Christianity and Catholicism, is in the grips of a profound spiritual unrest. As a lifelong Catholic and a defender of American values, I see a civilization teetering on the edge, not from external enemies, but from an internal collapse of faith and moral clarity. The rise of secularism, atheism, and corrosive ideologies like gender theory and Marxist Critical Theory has filled the void left by abandoned pews. Now, more than ever, we need a spiritual leader who speaks truth without fear, who draws a hard line against the radical left's assault on our values. Pope Leo XIV, the new American pontiff, has a divine opportunity to steer billions toward tradition, family, and reverence for what is holy--or risk letting the West slide further into misery and dysfunction.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dPWcN52jSK_aSLr5FdmZNgI8Qp4FnkwYxxZuBIQvRL0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163333539)
For centuries, the Catholic Church has been the moral bedrock of Western civilization. But today, in cities from New York to Paris, churches stand empty while people worship at the altars of relativism and self-indulgence. The numbers are stark: in the U.S., Gallup polls show church membership has **[dropped below 50% for the first time](https://substack.com/redirect/dfadd278-531c-4b26-985c-6c48f0f55dd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , with young people leading the exodus. ...

name: Colonel Pam Stevenson
subject: McConnell is out. I am in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107516561/544929561/-1129875431?refcode=250511_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWM0ZDM5NS1hNTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOMFNH_E3tCDCmvBCpWHxEYtu1REbWTqp4HjYK1mPDo=) Folks, I was born and raised right here in Kentucky. I’ve spent my life in service to our communities, state, and country. I served as a JAG attorney in the U.S. Air Force for 27 years with the rank of Colonel. In the Air Force, I successfully negotiated several hostage crises and prosecuted violent criminals and child sex offenders. I'm a nonprofit founder for legal services veterans and seniors in need, ordained minister, and the Floor Leader of the Kentucky House Democrats. I know firsthand the challenges Kentucky and our country are up against. [**So now, after 27 years of serving our state and our country, I am running for Senate, but I can't start this fight alone. That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally: Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight TONIGHT to help me kick off my campaign strong and show the world I have what it takes to win this race? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107516562/544929562/-1129875431?refcode=250511_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWM0ZDM5NS1hNTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOMFNH_E3tCDCmvBCpWHxEYtu1REbWTqp4HjYK1mPDo=) I’m ready to run for Senate to defend our freedoms and build an economy that works for everyone – no matter your background. Every American deserves access to food, clean water, healthcare, education, and shelter. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP do not see things the same way.** During his 40 years in the Senate, he’s put his personal quest for power and his special-interest allies ahead of our state, nation, and Constitution every time. I’m ready to turn the page. But I need you with me. [**I promise you I will put everything I have into winning this race and being a voice for every single American. But I can’t do it alone — and I’ll need the help of grassroots supporters like you every step of the way. So I’m humbly asking: Will you split a $10 between my campaign and Serve America before my deadline at midnight tonight and help me kick off my campaign with an unbeatable show of support? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107516563/544929563/-1129875431?refcode=250511_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWM0ZDM5NS1hNTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOMFNH_E3tCDCmvBCpWHxEYtu1REbWTqp4HjYK1mPDo=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107516564/544929564/-1129875431?refcode=250511_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWM0ZDM5NS1hNTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOMFNH_E3tCDCmvBCpWHxEYtu1REbWTqp4HjYK1mPDo=) In the Air Force, they taught us to live by “Duty. Honor. Country.” I ask you to stand with me and live by **“Duty. Honor. Kentucky.”** Thank you, Colonel Pam
Floor Leader, House Democrats
Candidate for U.S. Senate [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107516565/544929565/-1129875431?refcode=250511_Serve_Stevenson_McConnell&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWM0ZDM5NS1hNTJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jOMFNH_E3tCDCmvBCpWHxEYtu1REbWTqp4HjYK1mPDo=)

body:
Show the left that Conservatives are united

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Four months into President Trump’s second term, the left is still launching relentless attacks – not just on him, but on all Conservatives. They’re using the same tired tactics, labeling us as racists and fascists, hoping to divide and silence us.

But let me be clear: **WE WON’T BACK DOWN**.

As a freshman member of Congress, I’ve seen firsthand how critical it is for Conservatives to stand united. The left wants to see us fractured, but we know that unity is our greatest strength. Together, we can fend off these attacks and defend the America First values we believe in.

[**Will you chip in today to help me send a powerful message of Conservative UNITY to the left?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ CHIP IN NOW ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ SEND A MESSAGE ](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Your support will make a difference in showing the left that we’re strong, united, and here to fight for our values.

Thank you,

Congressman Troy Downing
