| | Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris. But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California. She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—**food, rent, medicine.** Kamala didn’t say a single word about that. Not one word about working families...
Not one plan to fix the mess her party created...
And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had. Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship. **Not on my watch.** I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back _freedom, opportunity, and common sense_ —to **Make California Golden Again**. [**Join my campaign today!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMuO2yAUhp8G77DgcLMXXiTjJNOO2kVSjdqVhQEnTI3t4Es6b185E2WDxMcn_vMfHYbWN58FUlsEcPF2RACIbRDA9c8txPkjvB1w-11-4Kv8GcT6Ci8PdYGn3Bm9HPmp_P23uY6Cb7_9u4Z6oU99-hzcU36Epi5o365UlYktWGMJT1xBFZd5LhWw5FLQLLM1sUywOpPKCEaNBdaArRullcoSXwABQQSlQAQVKrWWWZJnJqsbSWmuESf3nFQHF73RdJxuOsa-D6npQ9IWl2kaxvtgewT70Zk5ulR3zvbTaqxscovDF99OfYebPuJzv7jY9REDAYlgzzPmqCMWO2EZ5javcca1wcYZSUROmprx9Xu2n6dQjf0cjUOs3JYHfNy9I5ArDs76OSBW7n48yOTier9F-gBGh0H7c4dY-dWa5NW2PFSn15dN9fZ6qo679-r0a3PE65HEwg4337Z-lApxcr6vYS29FPA_AAD__-SnmOM) It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer. California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
And Kamala? She wants more of the same. **Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor.** But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine. **[Let’s prove them wrong.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMuO2yAUhp8G77DgcLMXXiTjJNOO2kVSjdqVhQEnTI3t4Es6b185E2WDxMcn_vMfHYbWN58FUlsEcPF2RACIbRDA9c8txPkjvB1w-11-4Kv8GcT6Ci8PdYGn3Bm9HPmp_P23uY6Cb7_9u4Z6oU99-hzcU36Epi5o365UlYktWGMJT1xBFZd5LhWw5FLQLLM1sUywOpPKCEaNBdaArRullcoSXwABQQSlQAQVKrWWWZJnJqsbSWmuESf3nFQHF73RdJxuOsa-D6npQ9IWl2kaxvtgewT70Zk5ulR3zvbTaqxscovDF99OfYebPuJzv7jY9REDAYlgzzPmqCMWO2EZ5javcca1wcYZSUROmprx9Xu2n6dQjf0cjUOs3JYHfNy9I5ArDs76OSBW7n48yOTier9F-gBGh0H7c4dY-dWa5NW2PFSn15dN9fZ6qo679-r0a3PE65HEwg4337Z-lApxcr6vYS29FPA_AAD__-SnmOM)** This race is going to come down to a clear choice: **_Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state_**
__**OR**__

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, In November of 2024, the American people rejected the radicalism of the Democrats and saved our nation from four years of Kamala Harris. But now, Californians must take up the gauntlet—because Kamala is getting ready to run for Governor of California. She just kicked off her “comeback” tour with a speech to a room full of Democrat elites in San Francisco. And while she was cracking jokes and spewing her usual word salad nonsense, 35% of Californians are struggling just to afford the basics—food, rent, medicine. Kamala didn’t say a single word about that. Not one word about working families... Not one plan to fix the mess her party created... And not even a hint of humility... Just more preening, more posturing, and more political theater from someone who’s been a disaster in every job she has had. Let’s be clear: this isn’t just her comeback tour. It’s a coronation plan. The Democrat machine wants to hand Kamala the Governorship. Not on my watch. I’m Steve Hilton, and I’m running for Governor of California to bring back freedom, opportunity, and common sense —to Make California Golden Again. It does not have to be like this. Californians do not have to be the victims of failed Democrat policies any longer. California can still be the greatest state in the country. I truly believe that with all my heart. We are the home of innovation, creativity, and hard work. But radical democrats like Gavin Newsom, Kamala Harris and their elite allies have turned our state into a cautionary tale for the rest of America. Crime is up. Homelessness is exploding. Public schools are failing. Housing is unaffordable. Businesses and families are fleeing. And Kamala? She wants more of the same. Kamala Harris failed as a presidential candidate. She failed as Vice President. And she would be catastrophic as Governor. But make no mistake—Kamala believes she can walk right into the Governor’s mansion. The elites are rallying around her. They think they can buy this race. They don’t believe someone like me—an outsider, a problem-solver, someone who speaks truth to power—can beat their broken machine. This race is going to come down to a clear choice: Fifteen more years of one-party rule from failed Democrats who wrecked this state OR A new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California golden again. So I’m calling on every proud Californian who wants to turn things around: We don’t need another elitist who talks in circles and dodges accountability. We need real leadership. We need to talk about the real issues. We need to take our state back. Join me—and let’s get to work. Steve Hilton Candidate for Governor of California P.S. Kamala Harris doesn’t want a serious debate—because her ideas are the ideas that have led to this calamity. If you’re ready to fight back, I need you on this team. | | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC ID#1480425 Please add mailto:info@stevehiltonforgovernor.com "info@stevegarvey.com" to your email contacts to make sure our updates are making it into your inbox. body:
We’ll cut straight to the chase – without you on our team, we can’t invest in state races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? We can’t win. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**What happens if a grassroots Democrat doesn’t activate their 2025 membership?** ****
1. Our DLCC membership team will stay stagnant at just over 10,000 members – which won’t be nearly enough to counteract right-wing billionaires’ spending.
2. State Democrats in places like your state and beyond won’t have the resources they need to compete against our opponents in upcoming special elections.
3. Expanding economic opportunity, protecting workers’ rights, and building a better future for people like you will become much, _much_ more difficult if Republicans keep amassing power.

**Listen, all you really need to know is this:** Without you on our team, we can’t invest in state legislative races. If we can’t invest, then we can’t compete. And if we can’t compete? _We can’t win._ [It’s simple – we need you to join the ranks of 10,000+ grassroots members who are fighting to ensure state Democrats have the tools they need to fight back against a MAGA takeover in the states. name: Working Families Party
subject: Your May WFP Newsletter is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, It’s been a _huge_ month in the fight for working people — with massive mobilizations, key victories, and critical battles on the horizon. **We’ve pulled together the highlights, the stakes ahead, and how you can take action.** Let’s dive in.
* * *
**_MILLIONS SAY: HANDS OFF!_** From April’s actions to May Day’s coast-to-coast marches, a wave of resistance is building across the country. Across red states and blue, in the biggest of cities and smallest of towns, over three million people have raised their voices over the past month to say: **Hands Off!** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9q52NfOSGsc7cSm3mqXQ4IPHtwoGfFoijOwndKNXvFC3dU2PAcVgGV30x-cHsjxD5tPhi92wTFZwayd_R3Zfgmxn_IIEmivxRDf6hf59-hFx9DJNtXxZI8ObLB6Y6yXdI-0EwGFGxOxi6LauoStEDPG0Dqnvkp-upwuflQvtPdkNQlYarCKX6NFeLV7S-g46K71hBeaodWeNFdzLC3VJsHE3HZ6-LQUxTZNKHhJjG5RIKDHhNPTMXL50oimS_xzndh3kuSIY2qdXvoaw9he-AJzLTuePxJ5x285xvZvp0klTnH1aQ6A662q9afOGg0j8clXSXvXrjwMjgwxo13ShHaoGlobPkL0GjHBSzL9iXafs/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h0/h001.1Csp52ZWgMI9wK5Elxo4CwSqrXdYP4LSC-SijtioMQI) Together, we are sending a clear message to Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their billionaire buddies: keep your greedy hands _off_ our Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, public services, federal workers, and schools. Across the country, over 3 million showed up in the streets in April — making it “one of the largest mass mobilizations in U.S. history,” according to researcher [**L.A. Kauffman**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uuqqbWgahNQJNOLkWs71YUzmIpNtwSU3duWIkxhvefb_ztAKt-ks6a2CFHfBIeN9-ukihubEVJgh-WkDoLIL6i_C8mf9BTS2NTx131cy3-6bwUJ090UPmVq_TXs_yvvtlZHyvRcUdtCr4fi7RDoJ_40jOkCDwwdwwwMW7LszVXQUpkFCRGnU2ec1waPAyYpi9C6IahMO6UbJivM1lDox9xVUnVkFPz8mUm0PFvWfb8oTM_XAmydtKK1t0Li4WnbaeNbAEpv8vyFMo2bLgcylhABFfIGaDAfCRi-iIrf3XhcSzd8qwzhkyqBC2l9UvNH13MA/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h1/h001.QMJgzOY582C8ReM0tBRu7_SR7iBg9h27tSCEp4FmKPo). And last week, hundreds of thousands took to the streets for May Day — showing up at 1,300 events in over 1,000 cities across all 50 states. As WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell put it on [**MSNBC**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg45NK0aXNz_PbesMsJjlPPYJFCva5Di8bVOfY2voIoLQWSwo0AZalZkmBHBMQQ0aBDpVDS5j0OroNQtezai6CZFSkYT-Cw7aFQqOWdmQwlIAoU3YxcZ3Yztai6JJKqmjxazkGtc_1dZ0L0XNNLAgkavc3n0R5cPdrxrZ-Z3CCl5q_69ttFwE_ga91eHdJ92iIJ1k572QeoOFu4yrN3GVlEaC7WstqxbVuuCsEX3WWYvL2A-YUOLEYhtnDlnYTkD5tdwKUgWSXKpvGIq_qYVoFkgy/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h2/h001.4PEZZIKcX2_DO_uQZdNg-iRGVEE0xITpXMz8rclJ45k), Trump’s “flood the zone” strategy is backfiring — and the people are fighting back. This week, Republicans in Congress are planning to advance their plans to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations — and pay for it by gutting Medicaid. But they're already feeling the heat from their constituents and afraid to show their faces in district. That’s why we need to keep the pressure on. [**Join the mass call this Thursday (5/15) at 8 PM ET/5 PM PT to find out how to dial up the pressure and stop them from taking away our health care:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxwYs7z7uDuwZqo8C4IDqBtX1N11lpxYC-RdVXoMQFlDO-sNwaaFhwCSPSiis_7eVMX68uGshXjp-Q_xRq_tA74Ffa9rsLStolZ8q1mjAWX6awtLyEDrZFl7rb-_vQaVgcvMr0tOq-cJkniK5cMNFNFwR3ksXNFTmjYF0VJS6UvDFHmQcu4vgSKANtWrKhCzo2ScixsXXx2SJFCAYYpeemvB9DwgiDTBf_q-vYTC7zXGg/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h3/h001.Wn2HWjF0y2HGwvlt_GxYEXZzaE_AdqLij3QxY3g3xp0) **[RSVP: Mass Call »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxwYs7z7uDuwZqo8C4IDqBtX1N11lpxYC-RdVXoMQFlDO-sNwaaFhwCSPSiis_7eVMVU980K4XMgX5lNHKQdqEPvwbrtq0RGmTlTz7SjRuCD1TJVsQ5VNUng_qTJZGEmyY_kY-dzxpFMRt1MgPbS7aGBHDbAbX53xkw_7gPbtxg1j-1DpQ3gmbXBEafNIHlpIjhjQywz30mlA_iGOCbKJVhghHVMDipyOd9KlHY6n5jbw/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h4/h001.7x4eWG1l0PWIOARwO8o6emU5GCJcdxqjRL3xHa6CP3k)**
* * *
**_NJ WFP ENDORSES RAS BARAKA FOR NEW JERSEY GOVERNOR — AND A PROGRESSIVE SLATE TO JOIN HIM:_** In April, the New Jersey Working Families Party joined a powerful coalition progressive labor unions and advocates to endorse Newark Mayor Ras Baraka in the hotly contested Democratic primary for governor — [**as featured in an exclusive with NJ.com.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbte27R8tOPsiXHhrDd-Q7oQBXroaTIqNDqNPgxlfpIAqb8c6KaQCr3gtZWQG42AY8EnbVY8CZSkGqjq-NigW7eWKvD58PC6gBthlZu-YHzXvFr98eXBZrouktCnzl8U71KQndAPit4l0udNkQVXvwy5QOZn_S9XmO8WZBuuiwI7349c62r678oJIstLDA_ZX4ojVnsx7npIj8Dgl6U7I0L3lR5ueVGaZHLeY_GfzJb16RnX1miD4-4CjsIcUlaWNTaECBBmrsurDQYj7QLDzFNF89mWObxPzjHn8pOVS-GXw-syWayIYpGlQjYmlq-xKC7Mi11u959pHiloWK1Op6Dtmj285LuqG3JVSk1JLI_RK3zsYrQ3JRUn231jNcYJk8YgqJQpgL6siEl__CnuccY/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h5/h001.S5Gp_R7jvqC9q8Id0RcDudMBHeJFKccan8uXps0pXrQ) This is the first statewide race since we helped strike down New Jersey’s corrupt county line system. Now, we’re backing a candidate who’s taken on the machine and won — and who delivers for working people. “We defeated the corrupt county line system, so we know exactly what it takes to win and reshape the halls of power in Trenton,” said Antoinette Miles, State Director of NJ Working Families Party. “We’ve worked with Ras since his first mayoral run, and we’re going all in to help him win and deliver transformational policies that bring down costs for working families.” Baraka’s record speaks for itself: community-based public safety, housing justice, and more. And now, he’s bringing that same fight to the governor’s office — to end the gravy train for special interests, and put working families first in Trenton. **On Friday, Mayor Baraka was arrested after attempting to visit a recently re-opened ICE detention facility.** This is a shocking act of intimidation, even by Trump standards—one that is straight from the authoritarian playbook. **[Join Representative Bonnie Watson Coleman and Mayor Ras Baraka on Monday, May 12 at 5pm ET for an emergency call and learn how to push back against Trump's authoritarian power grab:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdLYKALSS51m8VcipjtURaCTZ6kgFC1kaug92UaadBiI6aUkuGFCkCj2igWB2j0sxCj_a6K8yBCOyRgbHeUrkpKHNTNGAQ5KeALhd9qo9NJQFcaqcrNnlai2iVpd3pYyC7FRkasmmQ0-85IxDiqTGT2pY-TeamFfWI26n40221DA-F3ND378PmwPjBe_4iEvSqlG1omJ325NXZbj8JmyqiW-x8ca6CxYgl_lEevMiQW98Q/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h6/h001.Ri1nFWJrjzEIdLyf2i61hzQFaipNiB0dUw_hbooc5sA) ** [RSVP to Monday's call »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdLYKALSS51m8VcipjtURaCTZ6kgFC1kaug92UaadBiI6aUkuGFCkCj2igWB2j0sxCiCmWv3awOEjZ6c6ty2xO5ENWVjKoS6v0mrmXS_bpKqxyOmcD8dAL7qWbvberw21WkMlMaAJGWzqhFrdQ5Lntu8Vpi7SdWiyfIRizxwpxUDPGjlyIIh2nG-AILlCoYDguKx7uSSvqjjnXmc7HRgrfs7d7nGC8LY-BbvhJEETbUKQA/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h7/h001.1BbAoKMLqJCzA2fI4te7PuMPV4A-ALcKhvks4cmpwSk) NJWFP has also endorsed **a** **slate of candidates for the New Jersey State Assembly** — and one bold leader for Camden City Council — who are ready to join Ras in the fight to transform the state. **_STICKING IT TO THE OLIGARCHS:_** When **Senator Bernie Sanders** and **Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez** took their **Fighting Oligarchy Tour** to California, CA Working Families Party was right there with them — bringing the heat, the people, and the vision.
* In Los Angeles, **36,000 people** packed the streets — the _biggest_ rally ever for Bernie or AOC. WFP champs Ysabel Jurado and Eunisses Hernandez lit up the stage alongside music legends Joan Baez and Maggie Rogers.
* In Bakersfield, **thousands packed the arena** , with AOC calling out MAGA Rep. David Valadao just one day after WFP champion **Randy Villegas** launched his campaign to unseat him.
* In Folsom, a GOP stronghold, **30,000 people showed up** — in a city of just 80,000. WFP State Director **Jane Kim** opened the rally and laid out a bold vision for working families.

**_DEFENDING WFP INCUMBENTS IN PENNSYLVANIA:_** In Pennsylvania, we’ve endorsed Philadelphia District Attorney **Larry Krasner** for a third term and Pittsburgh Mayor **Ed Gainey** for a second — because they’ve shown what real progressive governance looks like. **In Pittsburgh,** Ed Gainey isn’t just talking the talk — he’s delivering. From taking on greedy developers to prioritizing affordable housing, Gainey has made it clear: Pittsburgh should work for all of us, not just the wealthy few. Now he’s facing a corporate-backed Democrat funded by Republican donors. We need Gainey back in office to keep building a city for the many, not the money. **In Philadelphia,** Larry Krasner has been a national leader in rethinking what justice can look like. Since 2017, he’s held corrupt cops accountable, exonerated the innocent, and helped drive down crime — all while standing tall against relentless attacks from the political establishment and right-wing forces. The fight to keep him in office is on, and we’re not backing down. And it doesn’t stop there. Across the state — from Erie to Allentown, Lancaster to Pittsburgh — we’ve endorsed **35+ local champions** : teachers, nurses, organizers, and neighbors. Not career politicians, but everyday people ready to fight for housing, justice, public schools, and working families. [**See the full slate of WFP champions across Pennsylvania here.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYd6eLP33O2GRZpvuK-wGuT_Dhu582hzcqGTrbPxc1kDYgThO6PjcSmwUoRJuaaN5vsvJDLmHT1ZtvsphhD_U3w6UEFNvmELRDGIh6a4fuAYRz7fWsiU8fmCSLWP0T0iNdlvnv2VVZM4yZV2aQ9WURJZY1nL8kwOU79XVfOClTUyvJjQCYxje9v1n0M7bahMLoc7G1N7cD84U-Rit8gpHQjk78jZWKQNoHkJvtjQy7CzxrU7AEhiKuZPaezzDhs_xMQvTDAxJrNjnqLy8EDSUOZKEiU9lrffXhpZB8DNSH0D/4ge/33YU7tycS4WDrSQaQ255Jg/h11/h001.lXTXJfwa2mpC5FRt7i_BiWO_4fi37fB5muvE5TqA-ao)

**_A CLEAN SWEEP IN OHIO:_** **Five candidates. Five wins.** In Ohio’s May 6th primary, _every_ **Working Families Party–endorsed candidate** advanced to the general election.
* **Jesse Vogel** , tenant lawyer and neighborhood advocate, advanced to the runoff for **Columbus City Council** , ready to fight for housing and transit that works for all.
* **Dr. Antoinette Miranda** , a lifelong educator, and **Mounir Lynch** , a proud CCS grad and health organizer, both advanced in the **Columbus City Schools Board** race — with Miranda winning the _highest_ percentage of the vote.
* **Ajmeri Hoque** , running unopposed, is on track to become **Ohio’s first Muslim judge** , bringing real fairness to **Franklin County Municipal Court**.
* **Fran Wilson** , a fourth-generation Akronite and queer organizer, defeated an incumbent to win the **Democratic nomination for Akron City Council (Ward 1)** — and is now heading to November.

“We’re proud to support these five candidates who are committed to moving their regions in a more progressive direction that benefits working people,” said **Aleena Starks** , Ohio WFP State Director. “Now, we’re focused on building the community power and resources needed to win big in November.”

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s been a huge month in the fight for working people — with massive mobilizations, key victories, and critical battles on the horizon. We’ve pulled together the highlights, the stakes ahead, and how you can take action. Let’s dive in. MILLIONS SAY: HANDS OFF! From April’s actions to May Day’s coast-to-coast marches, a wave of resistance is building across the country. Across red states and blue, in the biggest of cities and smallest of towns, over three million people have raised their voices over the past month to say: Hands Off! Together, we are sending a clear message to Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their billionaire buddies: keep your greedy hands off our Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, public services, federal workers, and schools. Across the country, over 3 million showed up in the streets in April — making it “one of the largest mass mobilizations in U.S. history,” according to researcher . And last week, hundreds of thousands took to the streets for May Day — showing up at 1,300 events in over 1,000 cities across all 50 states. As WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell put it on , Trump’s “flood the zone” strategy is backfiring — and the people are fighting back. This week, Republicans in Congress are planning to advance their plans to cut taxes for billionaires and big corporations — and pay for it by gutting Medicaid. But they're already feeling the heat from their constituents and afraid to show their faces in district. That’s why we need to keep the pressure on. NJ WFP ENDORSES RAS BARAKA FOR NEW JERSEY GOVERNOR — AND A PROGRESSIVE SLATE TO JOIN HIM: In April, the New Jersey Working Families Party joined a powerful coalition progressive labor unions and advocates to endorse Newark Mayor Ras Baraka in the hotly contested Democratic primary for governor — This is the first statewide race since we helped strike down New Jersey’s corrupt county line system. Now, we’re backing a candidate who’s taken on the machine and won — and who delivers for working people. “We defeated the corrupt county line system, so we know exactly what it takes to win and reshape the halls of power in Trenton,” said Antoinette Miles, State Director of NJ Working Families Party. “We’ve worked with Ras since his first mayoral run, and we’re going all in to help him win and deliver transformational policies that bring down costs for working families.” Baraka’s record speaks for itself: community-based public safety, housing justice, and more. And now, he’s bringing that same fight to the governor’s office — to end the gravy train for special interests, and put working families first in Trenton. On Friday, Mayor Baraka was arrested after attempting to visit a recently re-opened ICE detention facility. This is a shocking act of intimidation, even by Trump standards—one that is straight from the authoritarian playbook. NJWFP has also endorsed a slate of candidates for the New Jersey State Assembly — and one bold leader for Camden City Council — who are ready to join Ras in the fight to transform the state. STICKING IT TO THE OLIGARCHS: When Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez took their Fighting Oligarchy Tour to California, CA Working Families Party was right there with them — bringing the heat, the people, and the vision. In Los Angeles, 36,000 people packed the streets — the biggest rally ever for Bernie or AOC. WFP champs Ysabel Jurado and Eunisses Hernandez lit up the stage alongside music legends Joan Baez and Maggie Rogers. In Bakersfield, thousands packed the arena , with AOC calling out MAGA Rep. David Valadao just one day after WFP champion Randy Villegas launched his campaign to unseat him. In Folsom, a GOP stronghold, 30,000 people showed up — in a city of just 80,000. WFP State Director Jane Kim opened the rally and laid out a bold vision for working families. Jane also joined CBS News to break down what this momentum means — and why our movement is resonating in every corner of the country. DEFENDING WFP INCUMBENTS IN PENNSYLVANIA: In Pennsylvania, we’ve endorsed Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner for a third term and Pittsburgh Mayor Ed Gainey for a second — because they’ve shown what real progressive governance looks like. In Pittsburgh, Ed Gainey isn’t just talking the talk — he’s delivering. From taking on greedy developers to prioritizing affordable housing, Gainey has made it clear: Pittsburgh should work for all of us, not just the wealthy few. Now he’s facing a corporate-backed Democrat funded by Republican donors. We need Gainey back in office to keep building a city for the many, not the money. In Philadelphia, Larry Krasner has been a national leader in rethinking what justice can look like. Since 2017, he’s held corrupt cops accountable, exonerated the innocent, and helped drive down crime — all while standing tall against relentless attacks from the political establishment and right-wing forces. The fight to keep him in office is on, and we’re not backing down. And it doesn’t stop there. Across the state — from Erie to Allentown, Lancaster to Pittsburgh — we’ve endorsed 35+ local champions : teachers, nurses, organizers, and neighbors. Not career politicians, but everyday people ready to fight for housing, justice, public schools, and working families. A CLEAN SWEEP IN OHIO: Five candidates. Five wins. In Ohio’s May 6th primary, every Working Families Party–endorsed candidate advanced to the general election. Jesse Vogel , tenant lawyer and neighborhood advocate, advanced to the runoff for Columbus City Council , ready to fight for housing and transit that works for all. Dr. Antoinette Miranda , a lifelong educator, and Mounir Lynch , a proud CCS grad and health organizer, both advanced in the Columbus City Schools Board race — with Miranda winning the highest percentage of the vote. Ajmeri Hoque , running unopposed, is on track to become Ohio’s first Muslim judge , bringing real fairness to Franklin County Municipal Court. Fran Wilson , a fourth-generation Akronite and queer organizer, defeated an incumbent to win the Democratic nomination for Akron City Council (Ward 1) — and is now heading to November. “We’re proud to support these five candidates who are committed to moving their regions in a more progressive direction that benefits working people,” said Aleena Starks , Ohio WFP State Director. “Now, we’re focused on building the community power and resources needed to win big in November.” LATEST DROP: “NO ONE LIKES BILLIONAIRES” STICKER: If you missed it — our brand new dropped last month, and it’s already a favorite. This bold little statement packs a punch and it’s yours for just $5. And while you’re at it, don’t miss the rest of our WFP merch! OTHER UPCOMING EVENTS: Next week, the House committee that oversees health care spending will vote on a Republican budget plan that would slash hundreds of billions from Medicaid and other essential programs — just to hand more tax breaks to billionaires like Trump and Musk. And if it passes, these cuts, affecting millions of Americans, could reach the full House floor for a vote as early as the following week. We can stop them — but we need to act fast. This month’s WFP National Welcome Gathering is Thursday, May 22nd at 7:00 PM ET/4:00 PM PT! At the gathering, you can hear from WFP organizers who will share what we’re working on nationwide and any ways to get plugged in. If you’re feeling anxious about this political moment and the fight ahead, the Welcome Gathering is an opportunity to ground yourself in our shared values and community. We hope to see you there! Thanks for catching up with us, Peter. Across the country, Working Families Party members and allies are organizing, mobilizing, and pushing back against Trump, Musk, and their wealthy backers — all while building real power for working people. We’re up against deep pockets and relentless attacks, but our movement doesn’t back down. Every contribution helps fuel the work ahead. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . # [Trump to get $400 million airplane from Qatar as "gift." Demand he reject this unconstitutional bribe](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47013eef-268c-420c-a0cf-f9d7584e617e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T334de150-6fcc-4660-8942-116fd40ea6dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The ruling royal family of Qatar is gifting Donald Trump a super-luxury jet described as a "palace in the sky", and worth hundreds of millions of dollars. This is a blindingly obvious violation of the emoluments clause of the Constitution, which forbids such gifts, a naked attempt to curry favor with Trump, and there is no way he should be able to get away with this. [_**Demand that Trump reverse himself and reject this bribe NOW.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85c342e0-3a88-4a69-b730-0a52a6413b52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The plan calls for Trump to use this plane as Air Force One while president, and then take it with him when he leaves, as a "donation" to the Trump Library fund -- meaning he gets to keep it and use it for the rest of his life. This is a truly awful idea in so many ways. It violates the Constitution, the optics are terrible (every other country will wonder if they must also send supersized bribes to be treated equally), and it will cost the US government hundreds of millions more to take it apart to scan for surveillance devices, check the integrity of the plane, and upgrade the security to Air Force One standards. This is not normal, and we should not accept it as such. Trump gets a nearly half-billion dollar gift, the rest of us have to pay a fortune, and the Constitution is once again ripped to pieces by the man who took an oath to defend it. [_**Add your name: Demand that Trump reject this bribe NOW.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cedf4e0-d715-49a6-817d-eab9e38aa224/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter,
I didn’t run for office 5 years ago to become famous or get invited to swanky cocktail parties in Washington, D.C.
I ran because I was sick and tired of seeing our country speeding towards a cliff with career politicians from both parties at the wheel, and I decided to do something about it.
Then I got to Congress and saw firsthand just how corrupt and broken our government really is, and let me tell you, one of the biggest hurdles we face in our movement to save America is the U.S. Senate.
**The worst of them is Jon Ossoff, or as I like to call him, Radical Transgender Activist Jon Ossoff.**
Ossoff is already working behind the scenes to impeach and remove President Trump from office, he even admitted it at his recent town hall.
**He’s even running his re-election campaign as if I’m already his opponent****, smearing me every chance he gets, and using my name to fundraise from liberal online donors.**
**_[That’s right... Jon Ossoff can’t raise money without using MY NAME](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/xBeCca1GC9kl9ZbTG9Qnq1oBqNHYXBVTpOzhBull8PYDxWKTME85KUbIboVqEZsX7Q8u8ipWckQ0n9ZKwSNpYSDw29gmtD_7bOKXowNMZR5d5g8NI8CXm-LVrcu8qa6pzTCnjsWOuNo5__B5-gMpkw1CkExByV-4vlee7DdPAkrlsf2vUGlGmAAJZhUnX3PCv2xmDAMchhU7k5cd3pXsekYkZIptZKOBjjuldnLQhdcj4_Md7zf2sKiPM9Z_0Uk9NwTeplqm44x3QJEOCeHxUqXaYI8J9_WZyNLoLx6B2weSmIz8VNQYkw59vp0_i_nMxO4zMxd69NG6SvYjXK6MHabnmXoQUM7rgnHdbpkR7Yi6h1Sh6YCKra_AO6a982u1y7tx9yTvkyIa5T2uO4bafABvNqYDo-AfNeSqUQunbFWRnAgcYm-wdfwv5PgdADZqhy9dPB-jJHYeCnwq1G8J/fbh76Ia4dZtzrV5TmoOESlD7IJm8luD2/8)_.******
**[He is obviously terrified of me running for Senate... **I need to know if I should run for Senate in Georgia, and if I should I need to know if I will have your support or not.**
This would be the biggest fight of my life, the most important, the most brutal, and the most high-stakes.
_The radical Left_ ,_the fake news media_ , _the RINOs_ , _the globalist billionaires_ \- they would all come after me with everything they’ve got.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: An example for my daughters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Raising three strong, smart, and spirited girls is the greatest joy — and the greatest responsibility — of my life.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107517832/544933831/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-11_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZmNzJjNjAtYjEyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FjdJGKUKIZeksF81lYxJdMMrm5BtSIIYCclVrBL0mZY=)
---
| Happy Mother's Day, Peter! Today, I’m celebrating with the three people who shape everything I do: my daughters.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107517833/544933833/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-11_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZmNzJjNjAtYjEyZS1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FjdJGKUKIZeksF81lYxJdMMrm5BtSIIYCclVrBL0mZY=)
Raising three strong, smart, and spirited girls is the greatest joy — and the greatest responsibility — of my life. Like so many moms, my kids keep me on my toes. They remind me to be patient. And most of all, they inspire me to dream big.

I'm running for Governor for many reasons, but one is to set an example for my daughters.

I want Claire, Charlotte, and Catherine to see that serving your community matters. Especially now, when people's rights are threatened, we urgently need smart, confident women to take charge, stand up for our freedoms, and set out to make Virginia’s communities strong.

To all of my fellow moms, thank you! There's no more important job in the world.

With love,

Abigail Spanberger

Especially now, when people's rights are threatened, we urgently need smart, confident women to take charge, stand up for our freedoms, and set out to make Virginia’s communities strong. To all of my fellow moms, thank you! There's no more important job in the world. With love, Abigail Spanberger | = * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

[](https://substack.com/redirect/8d9f2dc2-4d9a-4231-85f7-8da514dc9ad5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
More Marge! MTG posted a lengthy post insulting Trump's agenda but pretended she wasn't ripping Trump. Uh-huh. She sees he's crashing with the GOP base and wants to run for Senator in GA (do it!). We discuss on this great livestream!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b1cd1b24-b3a6-46f6-b51e-6d9143c71507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[](https://substack.com/redirect/8238173a-03de-4161-8980-b6b8fdc33845?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Sign on to protect them »
#
Peter,
**Everyday Americans like you have worked hard to earn Social Security.** Right now, millions of people across the country rely on these benefits just to get through each month.
**But every year, out-of-touch politicians and elites in DC try to DESTROY Social Security.** Whether it’s trying to increase the retirement age, introduce means testing, or reduce benefits for certain Americans altogether — it’s all a direct threat to your hard-earned money.
**[If you’re ready to PROTECT Social Security and END these attacks on your benefits, please click the button below to sign on to our call to Congress today »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-email-20250511?t=1&akid=8930%2E614464%2EzvQDzw)**
**[SIGN ON: PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/hp-email-20250511?t=2&akid=8930%2E614464%2EzvQDzw)**
Thank you,
Heartland Patriots HQ

name: GOTV PAC
subject: 🚨 NJ at RISK
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Here's something to keep a close eye on: Republican voter turnout is surging in New Jersey's primary elections. And while the Garden State has leaned blue for years, the numbers don't lie. This trend could flip everything in 2025.
Between March and May, the GOP added over 7,500 new voters. Democrats? Just 1,200. That's a more than 6-to-1 advantage. And remember: Republicans already flipped five counties last year.
Yes, New Jersey still has more registered Democrats than Republicans. But when the other side is organizing, turning out voters, and closing the gap month after month — we can't afford to get comfortable.
GOTV PAC is preparing to make major investments in key New Jersey races after the June 10 primary, but the time to sound the alarm is right now. If we wait, we risk walking into a general election where Republican momentum is already baked in.
We can't let that happen.
So, Peter, will you donate today to help us gear up for critical voter turnout efforts in New Jersey? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05112025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=Email05112025] DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=Email05112025]
DONATE $60 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=60&refcode=Email05112025] DONATE $120 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=120&refcode=Email05112025]
OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05112025]
Unaffiliated voters now nearly match registered Democrats in New Jersey. That means turnout, not registration totals, will decide who wins.
And with Trump and his MAGA machine targeting these races, we have no choice but to show up strong.
Let's not lose a blue state because we underestimated the threat.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05112025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05112025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

Let's not lose a blue state because we underestimated the threat. Admittedly, Peter — my jump shot needs a bit of work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107517967/544934420/1735203190?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250511_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTU5MTU2Ny1iMzJlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGvYK1ldKXdOQNqL71JHmKpgs4OmRjZid-t42hBsVOU=&emci=3d591567-b32e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=3e591567-b32e-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15353729) But the good news? Dear Fellow American,

Do you support the Trump-Vance Administration’s efforts to secure
our borders and deport illegal aliens?

The liberal media certainly doesn’t.

That is why they’re writing vicious hit pieces against America’s

name: FROM SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON
subject: I'm sounding the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here’s the situation

|
---
| | | **- FROM THE DESK OF SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON-**
The real battle has just begun, Peter.

**As your Speaker of the House, I'm officially sounding the alarm: We just missed our April 30th deadline. **

**This comes at the worst possible time because the Radical Left is more determined than ever to undermine our values, destroy our economy, and dismantle our constitutional freedoms.**

**Here's the situation:** Top Democrats like Nancy Pelosi and Hakeem Jefferies have already raised a staggering amount of money to try and take back the House and impose their radical agenda on America. **We need to do everything in our power to stop them.**

That's why I'm turning to you today. We need your help to reach our goal and stay ahead of the Radical Left's money machine.

_This April goal is a one-time opportunity to supercharge our efforts and keep our House majority safe from liberal attacks as we charge into the summer._
---

| | [REACH OUR GOAL
>> DONATE NOW <<](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/UypHjCQ6qlKu92Dsfb2COGc4AkGgOgFDoiEdT8KrksXVxR7cTMENgTvkqbNYZklfDs2KNMXTaF3kwqxoSXsRDOcdiPZdg5x9ihRR6XsZ9ZlyT_fvlVTzcxgeFr6bUkPUhEVdHVfy_egahHBGjuWY2Q8X4cIpBoqk2-MR6ahW8sNoKJNO6LCGyCOWGY6QVwWv3GeENSu-V8IhwqkEmcQ98F2mkbZND18h4pOnfOumYtEfdc4kOsDALpw0gOCISpvc2oMsv82nC7moq6QPnOW-7KknqAq5x1h4Z5pI2wneyPaTXNS8fgRjiOi0wG0BcZM9B2MOnMhCsK-8tQoprtsTim04_k6E65Ey4Qli5UOF3irenjO4ZXmUyX4mSU5L4_OiY4OpYHtyov3smpbY6Plg_3bILuz2cGmdPZC8Fx8FL5Focs7tZ0iG8IEDFdRmkHRU5H2qciK_i6-raCBh_oTMZo3x-nd2djc4O6UGACNPrKQxMJA6iYOEn3sNNl3D-5I/DCuMZ8sZltj-zVbaDBzJHYGyBce7tlzN/8 "Generic Button")

I've seen firsthand the lengths to which the Radical Left will go to try and take control. They'll stop at nothing to:

❌Pack the Supreme Court with activist judges
❌Use their big liberal money machine to buy elections

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: I am the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BE BETTER AMERICA PAC
body:
My story

|
---
Fellow American,

Throughout my life, I have overcome significant obstacles to be where I am today.

I was raised in poverty on a pig farm in rural Alabama. We lived in a home with no insulation or running water, including an outhouse in the back and a well on the side.

Despite the odds, I was the first in my family to graduate from college, served ten years in the U.S. Military Reserves, and was subsequently accepted into Officer Candidate School. I transitioned into finance, academia, and media, becoming a frequent national television and radio commentator.

In 2020, I decided to continue my service to our country and launched campaigns for Pennsylvania's 4th district and again for Pennsylvania's Senate seat in 2022. Running as a black conservative isn't easy, but I had no choice but to stand up to the failed Democratic policies that have failed the black community and the broader American community, time and time again.

**Despite limited time, resources, and an unprecedented smear campaign, I earned more than 330,000 votes, defied expectations, and surged to become a formidable candidate in a crowded field.**

_This experience taught me that this journey is not about me. It 's about you and the beautiful people of Pennsylvania. _

I traveled 1,500 miles a week for 13 months, meeting my fellow Pennsylvanians. The people appreciated the authenticity of my journey, and I appreciated theirs. I heard their stories, could see their eyes, and felt their worries. I knew I was one of them, and that we are one together.

As a wife and mother of two, I deeply care about this country's future.
**
[I'm reaching out to help build a coalition for the next generation of Americans. Can I count on your support?](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=0fa11bd61ad8476189e72742cf08abf5&_e=qBz6RaAdIroCbdDxWM0zYy-v3Lv3YBbh4NTf1Wl9_TSPUoMMUhEHqQBZCtSQsDOZqaodce5jVUMx9qI6Jnf_yw-xjxP66UksUDjzCy7SgcM75l7rInvfSl4F8N_oQXrU3Rlyol-8dfJ0yDkVpU6IIZKAh-GApEuLbxczP1cGaKfu63eQgz8CrVt_e9C-uSZiJujUjNIWx8G9kBSCqC-p_wCed60IVkyyijDI7fjxbmsLMwqTog22mVW9bzba_MHLN2Xr8IWlff2haafr8rjLLMXwFtuW_42m90JtG9OXXFMqo6-s1_pfsJjtXFU0ayJy)**[](http://links.bbapac.com/u/click?_t=5784e5e40dc94351a7bcbabf677d3bf7&_m=0fa11bd61ad8476189e72742cf08abf5&_e=qBz6RaAdIroCbdDxWM0zYy-v3Lv3YBbh4NTf1Wl9_TSPUoMMUhEHqQBZCtSQsDOZqaodce5jVUMx9qI6Jnf_yw-xjxP66UksUDjzCy7SgcM75l7rInvfSl4F8N_oQXrU3Rlyol-8dfJ0yDkVpU6IIcd6yyYpjDAhFDf7F1iciqi_x1jk6BId1KDZ5eQsz5ei_yt72i7z9tRDTnkkXguRpgN6yGqzIrTan4w7CemT7KkLisafrCTSHYIVItvaoToOAP7Tk2ypJi-CBhEoaYK7_Zx-p6hBr12JCDnLlrZd5a-2FeskaywDw4dtHFy--4Ot)

clean_body: My story | Fellow American, Throughout my life, I have overcome significant obstacles to be where I am today. I was raised in poverty on a pig farm in rural Alabama. We lived in a home with no insulation or running water, including an outhouse in the back and a well on the side. Despite the odds, I was the first in my family to graduate from college, served ten years in the U.S. Military Reserves, and was subsequently accepted into Officer Candidate School. I transitioned into finance, academia, and media, becoming a frequent national television and radio commentator. In 2020, I decided to continue my service to our country and launched campaigns for Pennsylvania's 4th district and again for Pennsylvania's Senate seat in 2022. Running as a black conservative isn't easy, but I had no choice but to stand up to the failed Democratic policies that have failed the black community and the broader American community, time and time again. Despite limited time, resources, and an unprecedented smear campaign, I earned more than 330,000 votes, defied expectations, and surged to become a formidable candidate in a crowded field. This experience taught me that this journey is not about me. It 's about you and the beautiful people of Pennsylvania. I traveled 1,500 miles a week for 13 months, meeting my fellow Pennsylvanians. The people appreciated the authenticity of my journey, and I appreciated theirs. I heard their stories, could see their eyes, and felt their worries. I knew I was one of them, and that we are one together. As a wife and mother of two, I deeply care about this country's future. | Thank you, Kathy Barnette Be Better America | | PAID FOR BY BE BETTER AMERICA PAC Copyright (C) 2025 Be Better America PAC, All rights reserved.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.
